attributes.description:
Renders the supplied or derived legend entries below the cloud. It is non-interactive and
does not alter word activation or palette selection.

Type: `boolean`  
Default: `false`

elements.name: lr-xml-viewer
elements.description:
`<lr-xml-viewer>` ŌĆö collapsible, copyable, `DOMParser`-based tree view for XML documents,
mirroring `lr-json-viewer`'s UX (`collapsed-depth`, `copyable`, structural-path-keyed expand
state that survives a same-shape `xml` reassignment -- e.g. a streaming document being patched
in place) adapted for XML's own node kinds: elements with attributes, text, comments, CDATA
sections, and processing instructions.

Search is a purely imperative surface (`search()`/`searchNext()`/`searchPrevious()`/
`clearSearch()`), the same uniform contract every anchor-target, search-capable viewer in this
library implements (`lr-pdf-viewer`, `lr-ebook-viewer`, `lr-notebook-viewer`) rather than
a settable property. `node-path` anchors address an element by child-index chain from the
document root, with an optional trailing `'@attrName'` segment addressing one of that
element's attributes.

Namespace-literal: qualified names render exactly as authored, with no namespace-URI-aware
matching. `DOMParser` never resolves external entities or DTDs, so XXE injection is
structurally out of reach.

---

**CSS Shadow Parts**

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `attribute` | One attribute's name/value pair wrapper. |
| `attribute-name` | An attribute's name. |
| `attribute-value` | An attribute's value (`data-match`). |
| `base` | The root scroll container. |
| `cdata` | A CDATA section leaf. |
| `comment` | A comment leaf. |
| `copy-button` | A copy-to-clipboard button -- the whole-document one (in `toolbar`) or a per-node one (only when `copyable`). |
| `error` | The error region. |
| `node` | One element row (`data-active` while it's the resolved anchor target, `data-match` while any part of it matches the current search, `data-active-match` while it's the currently active search match). |
| `pi` | A processing-instruction leaf. |
| `spinner` | The loading status region. |
| `tag` | An element's tag name (`data-match`). |
| `text` | A text leaf (`data-match`). |
| `toggle` | An element's expand/collapse button (hidden, but present for row alignment, on leaf/empty elements). |
| `toolbar` | The whole-document copy button row (only when `copyable`). |
| `tree` | The rendered node tree. |

---

**CSS Custom Properties**

- `--lr-xml-viewer-max-height` (default: `none`) ŌĆö Maximum block size of the scrollable body before it scrolls internally. Also settable via the `max-height` property.
- `--lr-xml-viewer-active-match-color` (default: `var(--lr-color-warning)`) ŌĆö Outline color of the `[part="node"]` holding the current search match. Scoped to the active match, so the dashed outline on the other matches keeps the shared warning token.
- `--lr-xml-viewer-match-color` (default: `var(--lr-color-warning)`) ŌĆö Outline color of a (non-active) `[part="node"]` search match, and the tint source for a matching `[part="text"]`'s background. Distinct from `--lr-xml-viewer-active-match-color`, so the non-active matches can be recolored without touching the active one.
- `--lr-xml-viewer-match-bg` (default: `var(--lr-color-warning-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of a matching `[part="tag"]`/`[part="attribute-value"]`.

attributes.name: collapsed-depth
attributes.description:
Elements at or beyond this nesting depth (root = 0) start collapsed. Omit/undefined:
nothing auto-collapses.

Type: `number | undefined`

attributes.name: copyable
attributes.description:
Shows copy-to-clipboard affordances: one for the whole document, plus one per element.

Type: `boolean`  
Default: `false`

attributes.name: locale
attributes.description:
Optional locale override. Otherwise the nearest `locale`/`lang` ancestor is used.

Type: `string`  
Default: `''`

attributes.name: max-height
attributes.description:
A CSS length (e.g. `"20rem"`); once set, the viewer scrolls internally past this height
instead of growing the page.

Type: `string`  
Default: `''`

attributes.name: name
attributes.description:
Display name used as the viewer's accessible label.

Type: `string`  
Default: `''`

attributes.name: src
attributes.description:
URL to fetch and parse as XML. Ignored once `xml` is set.

Type: `string`  
Default: `''`

elements.name: lr-zoomable-frame
elements.description:
`<lr-zoomable-frame>` ŌĆö a scrollable frame for inspecting slotted or
image content at a bounded zoom level. Scrolling provides panning when the
content exceeds the frame; the controls and keyboard shortcuts change zoom.

Two public reset methods cover different needs: `resetZoom()` (also wired to the built-in
reset button and the `0` keyboard shortcut) returns zoom to 1 while intentionally preserving
the current pan/scroll position; `resetView()` additionally returns pan to the origin, for a
caller (e.g. `<lr-lightbox>`) that wants a fully clean view, such as when swapping to new
content entirely.

---

**Slots**

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| (default) | Content to inspect; when `src` is set, an image is rendered instead. |

---

**CSS Shadow Parts**

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `base` | The frame wrapper. |
| `content` | The transformed content wrapper. |
| `controls` | Zoom controls. |
| `reset` | Reset-to-100-percent button. |
| `viewport` | The scrollable viewport. |
| `zoom-in` | Zoom-in button. |
| `zoom-out` | Zoom-out button. |

---

**CSS Custom Properties**

- `--lr-zoomable-frame-min-block-size` ŌĆö Minimum viewport block size.
- `--lr-zoomable-frame-zoom` (default: `1`) ŌĆö The scale factor applied to `[part="content"]`. Written by the component itself on every render from the current `zoom`, so it is a read-out rather than a consumer knob; set the `zoom` property instead.

attributes.name: alt
attributes.description:
Type: `string`  
Default: `''`

attributes.name: aria-label
attributes.description:
Type: `string | null`  
Default: `null`

attributes.name: locale
attributes.description:
Optional locale override. Otherwise the nearest `locale`/`lang` ancestor is used.

Type: `string`  
Default: `''`

attributes.name: max-zoom
attributes.description:
Type: `number`  
Default: `4`

attributes.name: min-zoom
attributes.description:
Type: `number`  
Default: `0.5`

attributes.name: src
attributes.description:
Type: `string`  
Default: `''`

attributes.name: zoom
attributes.description:
Type: `number`  
Default: `1`

attributes.name: zoom-step
attributes.description:
Type: `number`  
Default: `0.25`

properties.name: --lr-activity-feed-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-activity-feed>`** (default: `16rem`) ŌĆö Cap on how tall the expanded body grows before it scrolls internally (non-virtualized mode); also sizes the internal virtual-list.

properties.name: --lr-agent-run-compact-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-agent-run>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-s)`) ŌĆö Gap between `[part="base"]`'s header and body while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-agent-run-compact-padding
properties.description: **`<lr-agent-run>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-s)`) ŌĆö `[part="base"]` padding while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-agent-run-spin
properties.description: **`<lr-agent-run>`** (default: `1s linear`) ŌĆö Current-step icon spin animation duration and timing.

properties.name: --lr-agent-trace-handoff-active-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-agent-trace>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of the active (`activeSpanId`) handoff quick-jump entry. Shadow Parts forbids an attribute selector after `::part()`, so the active entry could otherwise only be restyled by hijacking the library-wide `--lr-color-brand-quiet` token.

properties.name: --lr-animated-image-control-box-size
properties.description: **`<lr-animated-image>`** ŌĆö The size of `control-box`. Defaults to `var(--lr-icon-button-size)`.

properties.name: --lr-animated-image-icon-size
properties.description: **`<lr-animated-image>`** ŌĆö The size of the play/pause icons. Defaults to `calc(var(--lr-icon-button-size) * 0.35)`.

properties.name: --lr-animated-image-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-animated-image>`** ŌĆö Caps the rendered media's block-size. Defaults to `var(--lr-size-20rem)`.

properties.name: --lr-animation-bounce-height
properties.description: **`<lr-animation>`** (default: `25%`) ŌĆö Peak lift height of the bounce preset.

properties.name: --lr-animation-shake-distance
properties.description: **`<lr-animation>`** (default: `4%`) ŌĆö Horizontal travel of the shake preset.

properties.name: --lr-animation-slide-distance
properties.description: **`<lr-animation>`** (default: `100%`) ŌĆö Travel distance for the slide-in/slide-out/slide-in-up/slide-in-down presets.

properties.name: --lr-animation-zoom-scale
properties.description: **`<lr-animation>`** (default: `0.5`) ŌĆö Starting/ending scale factor for the zoom-in/zoom-out presets.

properties.name: --lr-app-rail-icon-width
properties.description: **`<lr-app-rail>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-4rem)`) ŌĆö The inline rail's width in `'icon-only'` mode, and the maximum width of each slotted `<lr-app-rail-item>` in that mode.

properties.name: --lr-app-rail-item-current-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-app-rail-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of the `active`/`aria-current="page"` item. Scoped to `[aria-current='page']` only and declared as an inline `var()` fallback (never on `:host`), so setting it on the element or an ancestor recolors only the current item without hijacking the library-wide `--lr-color-brand-quiet` token.

properties.name: --lr-app-rail-item-current-color
properties.description: **`<lr-app-rail-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Text/icon color of the `active`/`aria-current="page"` item.

properties.name: --lr-app-rail-mobile-width
properties.description: **`<lr-app-rail>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-18rem)`) ŌĆö The mobile overlay panel's width, capped at `85vw`.

properties.name: --lr-app-rail-overlay-color
properties.description: **`<lr-app-rail>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-overlay)`) ŌĆö The mobile overlay scrim's background.

properties.name: --lr-app-rail-width
properties.description: **`<lr-app-rail>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-15rem)`) ŌĆö The inline rail's width in `'full'` mode. Overridden by an inline width while a `resizable` rail has an explicit `railWidthPx`.

properties.name: --lr-artifact-panel-view-active-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-artifact-panel>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of the pressed (active) preview/code toggle button.

properties.name: --lr-artifact-panel-view-active-color
properties.description: **`<lr-artifact-panel>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Text color of the pressed (active) preview/code toggle button. Restyling the pressed state otherwise requires overriding the library-wide brand tokens, since `::part(view-button)[aria-pressed]` is invalid CSS.

properties.name: --lr-attachment-chip-accent
properties.description: **`<lr-attachment-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text-quiet)`) ŌĆö Accent color used for the status text, spinner, and progress fill. Auto-swapped per `status` (`uploading`/`error`/`done`); the default is the neutral `pending` tone.

properties.name: --lr-attachment-chip-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-attachment-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) ŌĆö Chip background, auto-swapped per `status` to that status's `-quiet` tint.

properties.name: --lr-attachment-chip-border
properties.description: **`<lr-attachment-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) ŌĆö Chip border color. Every non-`pending` `status` sets it to `transparent`.

properties.name: --lr-attachment-chip-compact-font-size
properties.description: **`<lr-attachment-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-xs)`) ŌĆö Font size of `[part="base"]` while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-attachment-chip-compact-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-attachment-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-0-25rem)`) ŌĆö Gap between the chip's parts while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-attachment-chip-compact-thumbnail-size
properties.description: **`<lr-attachment-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-75rem)`) ŌĆö Thumbnail and retry/preview/remove-button minimum size while `compact`, rethemeable independently of `--lr-icon-button-size`.

properties.name: --lr-attachment-chip-spinner-duration
properties.description: **`<lr-attachment-chip>`** (default: `0.8s`) ŌĆö Duration of one indeterminate upload-spinner rotation. The ambient loop stops under reduced motion.

properties.name: --lr-audio-visualizer-color
properties.description: **`<lr-audio-visualizer>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Active bar/waveform color.

properties.name: --lr-audio-visualizer-height
properties.description: **`<lr-audio-visualizer>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-3rem)`) ŌĆö The host's block size, which the canvas fills at 100%.

properties.name: --lr-audio-visualizer-quiet-color
properties.description: **`<lr-audio-visualizer>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Inactive/idle color.

properties.name: --lr-av-player-cue-active-match-color
properties.description: **`<lr-av-player>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-warning)`) ŌĆö Outline color of the `[part="cue"]` holding the current search match, leaving the other matches' dashed outline on the shared warning token.

properties.name: --lr-av-player-cue-current-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-av-player>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of the `[part="cue"]` the playhead is currently inside.

properties.name: --lr-av-player-marker-active-color
properties.description: **`<lr-av-player>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Outline color of the `[part="timeline-marker"]` matching `activeHighlightId`.

properties.name: --lr-av-player-marker-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-av-player>`** (default: `color-mix(in srgb, var(--lr-color-brand) 35%, transparent)`) ŌĆö Background of a `[part="timeline-marker"]` with no (or an unrecognized) `data-tone`.

properties.name: --lr-av-player-marker-danger-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-av-player>`** (default: `color-mix(in srgb, var(--lr-color-danger) 35%, transparent)`) ŌĆö Background of a `[part="timeline-marker"][data-tone="danger"]`.

properties.name: --lr-av-player-marker-neutral-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-av-player>`** (default: `color-mix(in srgb, var(--lr-color-text) 25%, transparent)`) ŌĆö Background of a `[part="timeline-marker"][data-tone="neutral"]`.

properties.name: --lr-av-player-marker-success-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-av-player>`** (default: `color-mix(in srgb, var(--lr-color-success) 35%, transparent)`) ŌĆö Background of a `[part="timeline-marker"][data-tone="success"]`.

properties.name: --lr-av-player-marker-warning-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-av-player>`** (default: `color-mix(in srgb, var(--lr-color-warning) 35%, transparent)`) ŌĆö Background of a `[part="timeline-marker"][data-tone="warning"]`.

properties.name: --lr-av-player-transcript-height
properties.description: **`<lr-av-player>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-16rem)`) ŌĆö Block size of the virtualized transcript list.

properties.name: --lr-avatar-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-avatar>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) ŌĆö Container background. Each non-neutral `tone` sets it to that tone's `-quiet` tint.

properties.name: --lr-avatar-color
properties.description: **`<lr-avatar>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Initials/glyph color. Each non-neutral `tone` sets it to that tone's loud color.

properties.name: --lr-avatar-font-size
properties.description: **`<lr-avatar>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-sm)`) ŌĆö Font size of the initials fallback (and of any `em`-sized slotted glyph). `size` swaps it to `var(--lr-font-size-xs)` (`sm`) or `var(--lr-font-size-md)` (`lg`), so the initials track the circle instead of staying at one fixed size across every tier.

properties.name: --lr-avatar-group-avatar-size
properties.description: **`<lr-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2rem)`) ŌĆö Sizes the overflow badge to match the slotted avatars. Does not resize the avatars themselves (see class doc) ŌĆö set a matching `size` on each `<lr-avatar>` child directly for that.

properties.name: --lr-avatar-group-badge-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) ŌĆö Overflow badge background. Tone-driven; see `tone`.

properties.name: --lr-avatar-group-badge-color
properties.description: **`<lr-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Overflow badge text color. Tone-driven; see `tone`.

properties.name: --lr-avatar-group-badge-font-size
properties.description: **`<lr-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-sm)`) ŌĆö Font size of the "+N" badge label. `size` swaps it to `var(--lr-font-size-xs)` (`sm`) or `var(--lr-font-size-md)` (`lg`), matching `<lr-avatar>`'s own `--lr-avatar-font-size` scale so the badge and the avatars it caps read at the same optical weight.

properties.name: --lr-avatar-group-overlap
properties.description: **`<lr-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-neg-6px)`) ŌĆö Horizontal overlap between consecutive avatars (a logical `margin-inline-start`, so it auto-mirrors under `dir="rtl"`). Setting this to `0` or a positive length is a supported escape hatch that turns the stack into normal, non-overlapping spacing.

properties.name: --lr-avatar-group-ring-color
properties.description: **`<lr-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) ŌĆö The cutout-style ring drawn around every avatar and the overflow badge.

properties.name: --lr-avatar-group-ring-width
properties.description: **`<lr-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lr-border-width-medium)`) ŌĆö Ring thickness.

properties.name: --lr-avatar-size
properties.description: **`<lr-avatar>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2rem)`) ŌĆö Inline and block size of the container. `size` swaps it to `var(--lr-size-1-5rem)` (`sm`) or `var(--lr-size-2-5rem)` (`lg`).

properties.name: --lr-badge-background
properties.description: **`<lr-badge>`, `<lr-tag>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) ŌĆö The badge's background. Each non-neutral `variant` sets it to that variant's `-quiet` tint.

properties.name: --lr-badge-border
properties.description: **`<lr-badge>`, `<lr-tag>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) ŌĆö The badge's border color. Each non-neutral `variant` sets it to that variant's loud color.

properties.name: --lr-badge-color
properties.description: **`<lr-badge>`, `<lr-tag>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö The badge's text color. Each non-neutral `variant` sets it to that variant's loud color.

properties.name: --lr-badge-font-size
properties.description: **`<lr-badge>`, `<lr-tag>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-sm)`) ŌĆö The badge's label font size. Each `size` sets it to that step's font size.

properties.name: --lr-badge-min-height
properties.description: **`<lr-badge>`, `<lr-tag>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-25rem)`) ŌĆö The badge's minimum block size. Each `size` sets it to that step's minimum block size.

properties.name: --lr-badge-padding-inline
properties.description: **`<lr-badge>`, `<lr-tag>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-s)`) ŌĆö The badge's inline padding. Each `size` sets it to that step's inline padding.

properties.name: --lr-badge-radius
properties.description: **`<lr-badge>`, `<lr-tag>`** (default: `var(--lr-radius-pill)`) ŌĆö Corner radius of the badge surface. Does not vary by `size` tier.

properties.name: --lr-breadcrumb-current-color
properties.description: **`<lr-breadcrumb-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text-quiet)`) ŌĆö Text color of the current-page item (`current`/`aria-current="page"`). Declared as an inline `var()` fallback (never on `:host`), so setting it on the element or an ancestor recolors only the current item without hijacking the library-wide `--lr-color-text-quiet` token.

properties.name: --lr-browser-frame-aspect-ratio
properties.description: **`<lr-browser-frame>`** (default: `16 / 9`) ŌĆö The viewport's aspect ratio.

properties.name: --lr-button-accent
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Text/glyph color for the chrome-less appearances (`outlined`, `plain`, `link`). Swapped per `variant` to that variant's semantic color.

properties.name: --lr-button-accent-fill
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-neutral)`) ŌĆö Background of `appearance="accent"` (and its border color). Swapped per `variant` to that variant's semantic color.

properties.name: --lr-button-accent-on-fill
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-on-neutral)`) ŌĆö Text color on top of `--lr-button-accent-fill`. Swapped per `variant` to that variant's `on-*` color.

properties.name: --lr-button-active-scale
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `0.9875`) ŌĆö `transform: scale()` factor applied while a non-disabled button is pressed.

properties.name: --lr-button-border
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) ŌĆö Border color of the internal button. Swapped per `variant` to that variant's semantic color.

properties.name: --lr-button-fill
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) ŌĆö Background of `appearance="filled"`. Swapped per `variant` to that variant's semantic color.

properties.name: --lr-button-font-size
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-m)`) ŌĆö Font size of the internal button, re-assigned per `size` tier (the default is the `m` tier's value). `appearance="link"` ignores it and inherits the ambient font instead.

properties.name: --lr-button-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-2xs)`) ŌĆö Gap between the icon/label and any slotted content in the internal button. Unlike the size knobs above it does not vary by `size` tier. Override it to retune without a `::part(base)` rule.

properties.name: --lr-button-group-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-button-group>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-2xs)`) ŌĆö Gap between grouped controls.

properties.name: --lr-button-height
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** ŌĆö Exact height of the internal button. **Undeclared by default** ŌĆö so the button keeps the active tier's `min-block-size` floor and an `auto` height, exactly as before. Set it (e.g. to pin the button to a fixed toolbar row) to both floor *and* cap the height. Never declare it as `auto`: a declared value wins over the `var()` fallback arm and would make every tier's floor dead code. `appearance="link"` ignores it.

properties.name: --lr-button-hover-brightness
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `1.08`) ŌĆö `filter: brightness()` multiplier applied while hovering a non-disabled button.

properties.name: --lr-button-min-height
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-button-size-m)`) ŌĆö The active tier's `min-block-size` floor. Re-assigned per `size` tier to that tier's own `--lr-button-size-*` token, and used as the fallback when `--lr-button-height` is unset.

properties.name: --lr-button-on-fill
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Text color on top of `--lr-button-fill`. Swapped per `variant` to that variant's `on-*` color.

properties.name: --lr-button-outlined-border
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border-strong)`) ŌĆö Border color of `appearance="outlined"`, which overrides `--lr-button-border`.

properties.name: --lr-button-outlined-fill
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `transparent`) ŌĆö Background of `appearance="outlined"`. Transparent by default; set it to tint the button (e.g. a faint surface wash behind the outline) without a `::part(base)` rule. Like `--lr-button-quiet-*`, it is deliberately *not* swapped per `variant`. Note that the `:hover` `filter: brightness()` applies to whatever fill is set, so a tinted outlined button now visibly brightens on hover where a transparent one did not.

properties.name: --lr-button-padding-block
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-xs)`) ŌĆö Block padding of the internal button, re-assigned per `size` tier (the default is the `m` tier's value). Override it to retune a tier without a `::part(base)` rule; `appearance="link"` ignores it (it renders with zero padding).

properties.name: --lr-button-padding-inline
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-m)`) ŌĆö Inline padding of the internal button, re-assigned per `size` tier (the default is the `m` tier's value). `appearance="link"` ignores it.

properties.name: --lr-button-quiet-border
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) ŌĆö Border color of `appearance="quiet"`.

properties.name: --lr-button-quiet-text
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text-quiet)`) ŌĆö Text color of `appearance="quiet"`.

properties.name: --lr-button-radius
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-radius)`) ŌĆö Corner radius of the internal button. Does not vary by `size` tier. `appearance="link"` ignores it (it renders with zero radius).

properties.name: --lr-button-shadow
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** ŌĆö Box shadow of the internal button. **Undeclared by default**, so `box-shadow` falls back to `none` ŌĆö byte-identical to before this property existed. Set it (e.g. an elevated/floating action button) without a `::part(base)` rule.

properties.name: --lr-button-size-2xs
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-25rem)`) ŌĆö `min-block-size` at `size="2xs"`.

properties.name: --lr-button-size-l
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-3rem)`) ŌĆö `min-block-size` at `size="l"`. Matches `lr-input`/`lr-select`/`lr-combobox`'s own `size="l"` control height.

properties.name: --lr-button-size-m
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2-5rem)`) ŌĆö `min-block-size` at `size="m"`. Matches `lr-input`/`lr-select`/`lr-combobox`'s own default control height, so a default-size button sitting next to a default-size input/select/combobox in the same row lines up.

properties.name: --lr-button-size-s
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-875rem)`) ŌĆö `min-block-size` at `size="s"`. Matches `lr-input`/`lr-select`/`lr-combobox`'s own `size="s"` control height.

properties.name: --lr-button-size-xl
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-3-5rem)`) ŌĆö `min-block-size` at `size="xl"`. Matches `lr-input`/`lr-select`/`lr-combobox`'s own `size="xl"` control height.

properties.name: --lr-button-size-xs
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-5rem)`) ŌĆö `min-block-size` at `size="xs"`.

properties.name: --lr-button-spinner-duration
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `1s`) ŌĆö Rotation period of the `loading` spinner.

properties.name: --lr-button-width
properties.description: **`<lr-button>`** (default: `100%`) ŌĆö Inline size of the internal button. The host defaults it to `100%` so the native button follows the host's own width; override to `auto` (or any other value) for a compact inline composition.

properties.name: --lr-calendar-day-min-block-size
properties.description: **`<lr-calendar>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-6rem)`) ŌĆö Minimum block size of a day cell.

properties.name: --lr-calendar-day-min-block-size-narrow
properties.description: **`<lr-calendar>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-4rem)`) ŌĆö Minimum block size of a day cell once the host is narrower than 28rem.

properties.name: --lr-calendar-day-selected-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-calendar>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of a selected day cell, decoupled from the shared token also driving the nav-button/agenda-event hover background.

properties.name: --lr-calendar-viewer-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-calendar-viewer>`** (default: `none`) ŌĆö Maximum block size of `[part="body"]` before it scrolls internally. The `maxHeight` property sets this token inline on `[part="base"]`.

properties.name: --lr-callout-background
properties.description: **`<lr-callout>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) ŌĆö The callout surface's background. Each non-neutral `variant` sets it to that variant's `-quiet` tint.

properties.name: --lr-callout-border
properties.description: **`<lr-callout>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) ŌĆö The callout surface's border color. Each non-neutral `variant` sets it to that variant's loud color.

properties.name: --lr-callout-close-hover-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-callout>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö The close button's hover background, decoupled from `--lr-callout-background` so a consumer can retint one without affecting the other (e.g. keeping the hover fill visibly distinct from a `variant="brand"` panel, which shares the same default token).

properties.name: --lr-callout-color
properties.description: **`<lr-callout>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö The callout's text color. Each non-neutral `variant` sets it to that variant's loud color.

properties.name: --lr-carousel-indicator-current-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-carousel>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of the current slide's indicator dot (`[aria-current="true"]`). Declared as an inline `var()` fallback (never on `:host`), so setting it on the element or an ancestor recolors only the current indicator without hijacking the library-wide `--lr-color-brand-quiet` token.

properties.name: --lr-carousel-indicator-current-border-color
properties.description: **`<lr-carousel>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Border color of the current slide's indicator dot.

properties.name: --lr-chart-grid-color
properties.description: **`<lr-bar-chart>`, `<lr-bubble-chart>`, `<lr-chart>`, `<lr-doughnut-chart>`, `<lr-histogram>`, `<lr-line-chart>`, `<lr-pie-chart>`, `<lr-polar-area-chart>`, `<lr-radar-chart>`, `<lr-scatter-chart>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) ŌĆö Grid-line color. Resolved via `getComputedStyle` on every draw (Chart.js paints to canvas and cannot consume `var()`).

properties.name: --lr-chart-height
properties.description: **`<lr-bar-chart>`, `<lr-bubble-chart>`, `<lr-chart>`, `<lr-doughnut-chart>`, `<lr-histogram>`, `<lr-line-chart>`, `<lr-pie-chart>`, `<lr-polar-area-chart>`, `<lr-radar-chart>`, `<lr-scatter-chart>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-280px)`) ŌĆö The host's `block-size`. Set on the host element from the `height` property on every change (custom properties only cascade downward, so it cannot be set from inside the shadow root); a host-level override is overwritten the next time `height` changes.

properties.name: --lr-chart-legend-color
properties.description: **`<lr-bar-chart>`, `<lr-bubble-chart>`, `<lr-chart>`, `<lr-doughnut-chart>`, `<lr-histogram>`, `<lr-line-chart>`, `<lr-pie-chart>`, `<lr-polar-area-chart>`, `<lr-radar-chart>`, `<lr-scatter-chart>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Legend label color. Resolved via `getComputedStyle` on every draw.

properties.name: --lr-chart-tick-color
properties.description: **`<lr-bar-chart>`, `<lr-bubble-chart>`, `<lr-chart>`, `<lr-doughnut-chart>`, `<lr-histogram>`, `<lr-line-chart>`, `<lr-pie-chart>`, `<lr-polar-area-chart>`, `<lr-radar-chart>`, `<lr-scatter-chart>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text-quiet)`) ŌĆö Axis tick-label color; also used for the `xLabel`/`yLabel`/`y2Label` axis-title text (there is no separate title-color token). Resolved via `getComputedStyle` on every draw.

properties.name: --lr-chart-tooltip-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-bar-chart>`, `<lr-bubble-chart>`, `<lr-chart>`, `<lr-doughnut-chart>`, `<lr-histogram>`, `<lr-line-chart>`, `<lr-pie-chart>`, `<lr-polar-area-chart>`, `<lr-radar-chart>`, `<lr-scatter-chart>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) ŌĆö Tooltip background color. Resolved via `getComputedStyle` on every draw.

properties.name: --lr-chart-tooltip-text
properties.description: **`<lr-bar-chart>`, `<lr-bubble-chart>`, `<lr-chart>`, `<lr-doughnut-chart>`, `<lr-histogram>`, `<lr-line-chart>`, `<lr-pie-chart>`, `<lr-polar-area-chart>`, `<lr-radar-chart>`, `<lr-scatter-chart>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Tooltip text color. Resolved via `getComputedStyle` on every draw.

properties.name: --lr-chat-composer-busy-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-chat-composer>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text-quiet)`) ŌĆö `action-button` background while `status` is `"sending"` or `"streaming"`. Scoped separately from the shared `--lr-color-text-quiet` token, which the `textarea` part's placeholder also reads -- overriding this recolors only the busy button, not the placeholder text too.

properties.name: --lr-chat-message-bubble-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-chat-message>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) ŌĆö Bubble fill for every role except `user`.

properties.name: --lr-chat-message-bubble-color
properties.description: **`<lr-chat-message>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Bubble text color for every role except `user`.

properties.name: --lr-chat-message-bubble-padding
properties.description: **`<lr-chat-message>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-m)`) ŌĆö Bubble padding. Prefer this over a `::part(bubble)` padding override: an outer-tree `::part` declaration outranks every rule in this shadow tree, which silently suppresses the per-`status` and per-role bubble styling below it.

properties.name: --lr-chat-message-bubble-radius
properties.description: **`<lr-chat-message>`** (default: `var(--lr-radius)`) ŌĆö Bubble corner radius. Bubble-only by design ŌĆö `collapse-button` and `retry-button` keep reading the shared `--lr-radius`, so a rounder bubble never desyncs the controls from the rest of the library.

properties.name: --lr-chat-message-max-width
properties.description: **`<lr-chat-message>`** (default: `80%`) ŌĆö Maximum inline size of the message bubble.

properties.name: --lr-chat-message-user-bubble-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-chat-message>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Bubble fill for `data-role="user"`.

properties.name: --lr-chat-message-user-bubble-color
properties.description: **`<lr-chat-message>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Bubble text color for `data-role="user"`.

properties.name: --lr-checkbox-checked-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-checkbox>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Background of `[part='box']` while `checked` or `indeterminate`. Retint just this control's checked fill without touching the shared `--lr-color-brand` token every other component also reads.

properties.name: --lr-checkbox-checked-border
properties.description: **`<lr-checkbox>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Border color of `[part='box']` while `checked` or `indeterminate`.

properties.name: --lr-checkbox-label-indent
properties.description: **`<lr-checkbox>`** (default: `calc(min(var(--lr-icon-button-size), 1.75rem) + var(--lr-space-s))`) ŌĆö The inline distance from the control's start edge to the start of the label text, i.e. the box's own floor plus the gap next to it. Published so a consumer composing per-option hint text under the label can align it without re-deriving that formula from the shadow styles, and used as the source of the real gap so the two cannot drift. Setting it on the element (or on `lr-checkbox` in your own stylesheet) moves the label; because custom properties inherit down and not sideways, it is *not* readable from a sibling node in your tree ŌĆö align a sibling by computing the same formula from `--lr-theme-icon-button-size` and `--lr-theme-space-s`, which you control.

properties.name: --lr-checkpoint-spin-duration
properties.description: **`<lr-checkpoint>`** (default: `1s`) ŌĆö Duration of one restoring-spinner rotation (stopped under reduced motion).

properties.name: --lr-chip-accent
properties.description: **`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Text/icon color of the pill. Each `tone` sets it to that tone's loud color.

properties.name: --lr-chip-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) ŌĆö Background of the pill. Each `tone` sets it to that tone's `-quiet` tint.

properties.name: --lr-chip-border
properties.description: **`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) ŌĆö Border color of the pill. Every non-neutral `tone` sets it to `transparent`.

properties.name: --lr-chip-font-size
properties.description: **`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-sm)`) ŌĆö Label font size. Each `size` sets it to that step's font size.

properties.name: --lr-chip-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-xs)`) ŌĆö Gap between the icon, label, and remove button. Each `size` sets it to that step's gap.

properties.name: --lr-chip-height
properties.description: **`<lr-chip>`** ŌĆö Exact block size of the chip. Undeclared by default, so the chip grows to fit its content (floored by `--lr-chip-min-height` when interactive). Set it to pin a fixed height. A value below the 24px interactive target is for non-interactive chips only.

properties.name: --lr-chip-icon-size
properties.description: **`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-sm)`) ŌĆö Font size of the `icon` slot wrapper. Each `size` sets it to that step's icon size.

properties.name: --lr-chip-min-height
properties.description: **`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-5rem)`) ŌĆö Minimum block size of an interactive (`removable`/`toggleable`) chip's tap target. `size` keeps `3xs`/`2xs`/`xs`/`s`/`m` at the `1.5rem` (24px) WCAG 2.2 SC 2.5.8 minimum and raises `l` to `var(--lr-size-1-75rem)` and `xl` to `var(--lr-size-2rem)`. Non-interactive display chips are unaffected by this floor.

properties.name: --lr-chip-padding-block
properties.description: **`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-0-25rem)`) ŌĆö Block padding of the pill. Each `size` sets it to that step's block padding.

properties.name: --lr-chip-padding-inline
properties.description: **`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-s)`) ŌĆö Inline padding of the pill. Each `size` sets it to that step's inline padding.

properties.name: --lr-chip-pressed-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-chip-bg)`) ŌĆö Background while a toggleable chip is selected, independently themeable from its resting background.

properties.name: --lr-chip-pressed-border
properties.description: **`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-chip-accent)`) ŌĆö Border color while a toggleable chip is selected, independently themeable from the label/icon color.

properties.name: --lr-chip-radius
properties.description: **`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-radius-pill)`) ŌĆö Corner radius of the pill and of the remove button, kept in sync so retuning one retunes both. Does not vary by `size` tier.

properties.name: --lr-chunk-inspector-current-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-chunk-inspector>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of the chunk matching `activeId`. **Contrast-sensitive:** paired with `--lr-chunk-inspector-current-color`, which has to keep a 4.5:1 ratio against it.

properties.name: --lr-chunk-inspector-current-color
properties.description: **`<lr-chunk-inspector>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Text color of the current chunk's `[part="score"]` line. **Contrast-sensitive:** the quiet token it replaces only reaches ~4.24:1 against the current background, so override this together with `--lr-chunk-inspector-current-bg`, never alone.

properties.name: --lr-citation-badge-accent
properties.description: **`<lr-citation-badge>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text-quiet)`) ŌĆö Text color of `base`, and its hover border color. Swapped by the reflected `status`: `var(--lr-color-success)` for `high`/`verified`, `var(--lr-color-warning)` for `medium`/`low`, `var(--lr-color-danger)` for `unverified`.

properties.name: --lr-citation-badge-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-citation-badge>`** (default: `transparent`) ŌĆö Background of `base`. Swapped by the reflected `status` to the matching `-quiet` tone (`success`/`warning`/`danger`).

properties.name: --lr-citation-badge-border
properties.description: **`<lr-citation-badge>`** (default: `transparent`) ŌĆö Resting border color of `base`; no `status` changes it, so it stays transparent unless a host overrides it.

properties.name: --lr-code-block-active-line-outline-color
properties.description:
**`<lr-code-block>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Outline color of the line marked active by `active-highlight-id`. Retints just that outline, leaving every other `--lr-color-brand` surface in the component (header pill, hover states, focus ring) alone. Inherits, so it can also be set on an ancestor or at the theme level.

**`<lr-code-block-core>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Outline color of the line marked active by `active-highlight-id`, leaving every other `--lr-color-brand` surface in the component alone.

properties.name: --lr-code-block-font
properties.description: **`<lr-code-block>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-mono)`) ŌĆö Monospace family for the rendered `pre` and `code`.

properties.name: --lr-code-block-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-code-block>`** (default: `none`) ŌĆö Scroll cap applied to `body`. The `max-height` attribute, when set, writes this same property inline on `body` and therefore wins.

properties.name: --lr-code-block-tab-size
properties.description:
**`<lr-code-block>`** (default: `2`) ŌĆö Tab width for the rendered code, applied to `pre`. Same default as `--lr-code-editor-tab-size`, so the editable and read-only code surfaces agree; `lr-markdown`/`lr-markdown-core` declare the same token for their own `code-block` part (they are sibling elements, so they cannot inherit this one). Read as a token and never written inline, so a host override survives shiki's own inline `style` on the highlighted `pre`. The default is a `var()` fallback at the point of use rather than a `:host` declaration, so it inherits: set it on the element, a container, or `:root` and it reaches every code surface below. The markdown surface wraps (`white-space: pre-wrap`) while this one does not, so the same value can look different on a wrapped line, where tab stops restart.

**`<lr-code-block-core>`** (default: `2`) ŌĆö Tab width for the rendered code, applied to `pre`. Shared with `lr-code-block` (this component reuses its stylesheet), `lr-code-editor`, and the markdown viewers' own `code-block` part, so every code surface agrees on a tab's width.

**`<lr-markdown>`, `<lr-markdown-core>`** (default: `2`) ŌĆö Tab width for a rendered fenced/indented `code-block`. Deliberately the same token (and default) `lr-code-block` and `lr-code-editor` use, so a consumer sets one tab width for every code surface ŌĆö it is declared here rather than inherited because `lr-code-block` is a sibling element, not an ancestor. A markdown code block wraps (`white-space: pre-wrap`) while `lr-code-block` does not, so the same value can render differently on a wrapped line, where tab stops restart.

properties.name: --lr-code-editor-line-height
properties.description: **`<lr-code-editor>`** (default: `1.5`) ŌĆö Line height shared by the gutter and the textarea, so line numbers stay aligned with their lines.

properties.name: --lr-code-editor-min-block-size
properties.description: **`<lr-code-editor>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-8rem)`) ŌĆö Minimum block size of the editor frame and its textarea.

properties.name: --lr-code-editor-tab-size
properties.description: **`<lr-code-editor>`** (default: `2`) ŌĆö The textarea's `tab-size`. The single channel for tab width ŌĆö the class writes this token rather than setting `tab-size` directly.

properties.name: --lr-color-picker-swatch-size
properties.description: **`<lr-color-picker>`** ŌĆö The swatch's inline and block size, scaled by `size`.

properties.name: --lr-combobox-expand-size
properties.description: **`<lr-combobox>`** ŌĆö Decorative expand-icon box size, scaled by `size`.

properties.name: --lr-combobox-font-size
properties.description: **`<lr-combobox>`** ŌĆö Input text size.

properties.name: --lr-combobox-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-combobox>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-xs)`) ŌĆö Gap between the start/end adornments, tags, and filter input inside the trigger row. Unlike the size knobs above it does not vary by `size` tier. Override it to retune without a `::part(combobox)` rule.

properties.name: --lr-combobox-option-active-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-combobox>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of a hovered or keyboard-active option row.

properties.name: --lr-combobox-option-selected-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-combobox>`** (default: `transparent`) ŌĆö Background of the currently-selected option row. Not declared on `:host`; retheme without hijacking `--lr-color-brand`.

properties.name: --lr-combobox-option-selected-border
properties.description: **`<lr-combobox>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Border color of the selected option row.

properties.name: --lr-combobox-option-selected-color
properties.description: **`<lr-combobox>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Text color of the selected option row.

properties.name: --lr-combobox-option-selected-font-weight
properties.description: **`<lr-combobox>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-weight-semibold)`) ŌĆö Font weight of the selected option row.

properties.name: --lr-combobox-radius
properties.description: **`<lr-combobox>`** (default: `var(--lr-radius)`) ŌĆö Corner radius of the trigger row (`[part='combobox']`). Does not vary by `size` tier.

properties.name: --lr-combobox-tag-font-size
properties.description: **`<lr-combobox>`** ŌĆö Selected-tag text size.

properties.name: --lr-combobox-tag-padding
properties.description: **`<lr-combobox>`** ŌĆö Selected-tag padding.

properties.name: --lr-combobox-trigger-height
properties.description: **`<lr-combobox>`** ŌĆö Exact input-container height. Unset by default, which leaves `--lr-combobox-trigger-min-height` as a floor only; set it to a length to both floor and cap the row (e.g. to pixel-match `<lr-input>`/`<lr-select>` in the same toolbar). Because it is never declared by the component itself, it can be set from an ancestor or an outer-tree rule as well as inline on the element. Intended for a single-row combobox: in `multiple` mode a tag row long enough to wrap overflows the pinned box visibly (nothing is clipped or made unreachable), so leave it unset there.

properties.name: --lr-combobox-trigger-min-height
properties.description: **`<lr-combobox>`** ŌĆö Minimum input-container block size, scaled by `size`.

properties.name: --lr-combobox-trigger-padding
properties.description: **`<lr-combobox>`** ŌĆö Padding inside the input container.

properties.name: --lr-command-palette-active-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-command-palette>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of the active (keyboard-highlighted, `data-active="true"`) command row. Declared as an inline `var()` fallback (never on `:host`), so setting it on the element or an ancestor recolors only the active row without hijacking the library-wide `--lr-color-brand-quiet` token.

properties.name: --lr-command-palette-list-max-block-size
properties.description: **`<lr-command-palette>`** (default: `50vh`) ŌĆö Maximum height of the scrolling command list.

properties.name: --lr-command-palette-max-block-size
properties.description: **`<lr-command-palette>`** (default: `70vh`) ŌĆö Maximum dialog height.

properties.name: --lr-command-palette-max-inline-size
properties.description: **`<lr-command-palette>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-48rem)`) ŌĆö Maximum dialog width.

properties.name: --lr-command-palette-offset-block-start
properties.description: **`<lr-command-palette>`** (default: `12vh`) ŌĆö Gap between the viewport top and the dialog.

properties.name: --lr-command-palette-z-index
properties.description: **`<lr-command-palette>`** (default: `var(--lr-overlay-stack-index, var(--lr-layer-modal))`) ŌĆö Stacking index of the backdrop.

properties.name: --lr-commit-card-compact-padding
properties.description: **`<lr-commit-card>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-s)`) ŌĆö `[part="base"]` padding while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-compare-panel-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-compare-panel>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-24rem)`) ŌĆö Cap on how tall each pane's scroll region grows before it scrolls internally.

properties.name: --lr-confirm-bar-compact-background
properties.description: **`<lr-confirm-bar>`** (default: `transparent`) ŌĆö Background of `[part='base']` while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-confirm-bar-compact-border
properties.description: **`<lr-confirm-bar>`** (default: `none`) ŌĆö Border of `[part='base']` while `compact`. Accepts any `border` shorthand.

properties.name: --lr-confirm-bar-compact-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-confirm-bar>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-s)`) ŌĆö Gap between the row's items while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-confirm-bar-compact-padding
properties.description: **`<lr-confirm-bar>`** (default: `0`) ŌĆö Padding of `[part='base']` while `compact`. Accepts any padding shorthand.

properties.name: --lr-confirm-bar-compact-radius
properties.description: **`<lr-confirm-bar>`** (default: `0`) ŌĆö Border radius of `[part='base']` while `compact` (only visible once `--lr-confirm-bar-compact-border`/`-background` are set).

properties.name: --lr-contact-viewer-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-contact-viewer>`** (default: `none`) ŌĆö Maximum block size of the scrollable body before it scrolls internally. Also settable via the `max-height` property.

properties.name: --lr-context-meter-segment-color
properties.description: **`<lr-context-meter>`** ŌĆö Per-segment color. Set inline on `[part="segment"]` by the component itself whenever that segment supplies a `color`; unset (and the token unread) otherwise, leaving the `data-tone` palette in charge.

properties.name: --lr-control-group-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-control-group>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-xs)`) ŌĆö Gap between grouped controls.

properties.name: --lr-conversation-item-active-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-conversation-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of the row while `active`. **Contrast-sensitive:** it is one half of a documented WCAG-AA pair ŌĆö the active row's text is sized/toned for this background, so an override has to keep at least a 4.5:1 ratio against `--lr-conversation-item-active-color` (excerpt/timestamp) and against `--lr-color-text` (the title, which is not restyled by the pair).

properties.name: --lr-conversation-item-active-color
properties.description: **`<lr-conversation-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Text color of `[part="excerpt"]` and `[part="timestamp"]` while `active`. **Contrast-sensitive:** it exists precisely because `--lr-color-text-quiet` only reaches ~4.25:1 against the active background; override it together with `--lr-conversation-item-active-bg`, never alone.

properties.name: --lr-conversation-item-active-indicator-color
properties.description: **`<lr-conversation-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Color of the decorative `[part="active-indicator"]` while `active`.

properties.name: --lr-conversation-item-active-indicator-inset-inline
properties.description: **`<lr-conversation-item>`** (default: `0 auto`) ŌĆö Logical inline-start and inline-end insets for `[part="active-indicator"]`; set `auto 0` to place it at inline-end.

properties.name: --lr-conversation-item-active-indicator-width
properties.description: **`<lr-conversation-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2px)`) ŌĆö Inline size of `[part="active-indicator"]` while `active`.

properties.name: --lr-conversation-item-compact-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-conversation-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-2xs)`) ŌĆö Gap between `[part="base"]`'s columns while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-conversation-item-compact-padding
properties.description: **`<lr-conversation-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-xs) var(--lr-space-s)`) ŌĆö `[part="base"]` padding while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-csv-viewer-highlight-color
properties.description: **`<lr-csv-viewer>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Outline color of a highlighted cell. The active highlight sets it inline to `var(--lr-color-warning, var(--lr-color-brand))`.

properties.name: --lr-csv-viewer-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-csv-viewer>`** (default: `none`) ŌĆö Maximum block size of `[part="body"]` before it scrolls internally. The `maxHeight` property sets this token inline on `[part="base"]`.

properties.name: --lr-dashboard-grid-cell-hover-outline-color
properties.description: **`<lr-dashboard-grid>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border-strong)`) ŌĆö Outline color of a cell's mouse-hover preview of its own `:focus-visible` ring (shown because every cell is a real focusable, draggable/resizable target). Set to `transparent` to opt out.

properties.name: --lr-dashboard-grid-columns
properties.description: **`<lr-dashboard-grid>`** (default: `12`) ŌĆö Column count of the underlying CSS Grid. Written inline on `[part="base"]` from the `columns` property on every render, so the fallback only applies to a `[part="base"]` this component has not rendered yet.

properties.name: --lr-dashboard-grid-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-dashboard-grid>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-m)`) ŌĆö Gap between cells on both axes. Written inline on `[part="base"]` from the `gap` property (in px) on every render.

properties.name: --lr-dashboard-grid-row-height
properties.description: **`<lr-dashboard-grid>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-5rem)`) ŌĆö Row track height. Written inline on `[part="base"]` from the `rowHeight` property (in px) on every render.

properties.name: --lr-dataset-viewer-highlight-color
properties.description: **`<lr-dataset-viewer>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Outline color of a highlighted cell. The active highlight sets it inline to `var(--lr-color-warning, var(--lr-color-brand))`.

properties.name: --lr-dataset-viewer-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-dataset-viewer>`** (default: `none`) ŌĆö Maximum block size of `[part="body"]` before it scrolls internally. The `maxHeight` property sets this token inline on `[part="base"]`.

properties.name: --lr-date-input-control-height
properties.description: **`<lr-date-input>`** ŌĆö Exact block size of the input row. Undeclared by default, so the row grows to fit its content (floored by `--lr-date-input-control-min-height`). Set it to pin a fixed height; the calendar toggle keeps its own 24x24 touch target even when this pins a shorter row.

properties.name: --lr-date-input-control-min-height
properties.description: **`<lr-date-input>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2-5rem)`) ŌĆö Minimum block size of the input row, scaled by `size` to mirror `lr-input`'s own min-height scale. Each default sits below the row's transitively-pinned height, so it is dead until a consumer raises it -- the unset render is unchanged.

properties.name: --lr-date-input-font-size
properties.description: **`<lr-date-input>`** (default: `inherit`) ŌĆö Font size of the text input, scaled by `size`.

properties.name: --lr-date-input-padding-block
properties.description: **`<lr-date-input>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-xs)`) ŌĆö Block padding of the input row, scaled by `size`.

properties.name: --lr-date-input-padding-inline
properties.description: **`<lr-date-input>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-s)`) ŌĆö Inline padding of the input row, scaled by `size`.

properties.name: --lr-dialog-max-width
properties.description: **`<lr-dialog>`, `<lr-drawer>`** (default: `var(--lr-dialog-width, var(--lr-size-32rem))`) ŌĆö Cap on the panel's inline size. Falls back to `--lr-dialog-width` when that is set, so an assertive width is not clipped by the 32rem default; the viewport (`100%`) is always a hard limit on top.

properties.name: --lr-dialog-overlay-color
properties.description: **`<lr-dialog>`, `<lr-drawer>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-overlay)`) ŌĆö Backdrop scrim color.

properties.name: --lr-dialog-width
properties.description: **`<lr-dialog>`, `<lr-drawer>`** (default: `auto`) ŌĆö Assertive inline size for the panel. Left at `auto` the panel shrink-wraps to its content.

properties.name: --lr-diff-view-font
properties.description: **`<lr-diff-view>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-mono)`) ŌĆö Font family used for the diff lines.

properties.name: --lr-dock-panel-collapsed-size
properties.description: **`<lr-dock-panel>`** (default: `var(--lr-icon-button-size)`) ŌĆö The extent the panel keeps along its resize axis while `collapsed` -- enough to still host the toggle button that re-expands it.

properties.name: --lr-document-compare-pane-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-document-compare>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-24rem)`) ŌĆö Maximum block size of a side-by-side pane before it scrolls internally.

properties.name: --lr-document-preview-active-border
properties.description: **`<lr-document-preview>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-warning, var(--lr-color-brand))`) ŌĆö Border color of the `[part="region-highlight"]` matching `activeHighlightId` (image format only). Distinct from the resting highlight border.

properties.name: --lr-document-preview-font
properties.description: **`<lr-document-preview>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-mono)`) ŌĆö Font used for plain-text previews.

properties.name: --lr-document-preview-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-document-preview>`** (default: `none`) ŌĆö Maximum body block size before the preview scrolls internally.

properties.name: --lr-document-preview-progress
properties.description: **`<lr-document-preview>`** (default: `0`) ŌĆö Unitless 0-100 completion of the determinate loading ring (multiplied by `1%` in its conic gradient). Written inline by the component from the clamped `progress` value, so it is a read-out rather than a consumer knob.

properties.name: --lr-document-preview-spin-duration
properties.description: **`<lr-document-preview>`** (default: `0.8s`) ŌĆö Duration of one indeterminate loading-indicator rotation.

properties.name: --lr-document-viewer-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-document-viewer>`** (default: `70vh`) ŌĆö Maximum block size of the dialog body before it scrolls internally.

properties.name: --lr-docx-viewer-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-docx-viewer>`** (default: `none`) ŌĆö Maximum block size of the scrollable document body before it scrolls internally. Also settable via the `max-height` property.

properties.name: --lr-drawer-enter-x
properties.description: **`<lr-drawer>`** (default: `calc(-1 * var(--lr-size-1rem))`) ŌĆö Horizontal offset the panel animates in from for start/end drawers. Set per placement (and flipped under RTL) by the stylesheet; only read when `prefers-reduced-motion` is `no-preference`.

properties.name: --lr-drawer-enter-y
properties.description: **`<lr-drawer>`** (default: `calc(-1 * var(--lr-size-1rem))`) ŌĆö Vertical offset the panel animates in from for top/bottom drawers. Set to `var(--lr-size-1rem)` for `bottom`; only read when `prefers-reduced-motion` is `no-preference`.

properties.name: --lr-drawer-height
properties.description: **`<lr-drawer>`** ŌĆö Block size for top/bottom drawers.

properties.name: --lr-drawer-width
properties.description: **`<lr-drawer>`** ŌĆö Inline size for start/end drawers.

properties.name: --lr-email-viewer-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-email-viewer>`** (default: `none`) ŌĆö Maximum block size of `[part="body"]` before it scrolls internally. The `maxHeight` property sets this token inline on `[part="base"]`.

properties.name: --lr-emoji-picker-active-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-emoji-picker>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of the keyboard-active (`data-active`) **and** hovered emoji button ŌĆö the two share a single rule, so this one hook retints both consistently. Declared as an inline `var()` fallback (never on `:host`), so setting it on the element or an ancestor recolors only the emoji highlight without hijacking the library-wide `--lr-color-brand-quiet` token.

properties.name: --lr-emoji-picker-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-emoji-picker>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-2xs)`) ŌĆö Gap between emoji within a windowed row.

properties.name: --lr-emoji-picker-glyph-size
properties.description: **`<lr-emoji-picker>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-lg)`) ŌĆö Font size of the emoji glyph, scaled by the `size` property to keep the glyph proportional to the item box.

properties.name: --lr-emoji-picker-item-size
properties.description: **`<lr-emoji-picker>`** (default: `var(--lr-icon-button-size)`) ŌĆö Each emoji button's box. Clamped up to `--lr-icon-button-size`: a smaller value does not shrink the button.

properties.name: --lr-emoji-picker-row-height
properties.description: **`<lr-emoji-picker>`** (default: `calc(var(--lr-emoji-picker-item-size) + var(--lr-space-l))`) ŌĆö One windowed row's height. Must stay at or above the item size plus the group-label band, or consecutive absolutely-positioned rows overlap.

properties.name: --lr-empty-compact-align
properties.description: **`<lr-empty>`** ŌĆö Cross-axis and text alignment used in compact mode; set to `center` for dense but centered empty states.

properties.name: --lr-empty-compact-font-size
properties.description: **`<lr-empty>`** ŌĆö Heading font size used in compact mode. Unset by default (no fallback), so the heading keeps its ordinary inherited font size until a consumer opts in.

properties.name: --lr-empty-compact-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-empty>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-2xs)`) ŌĆö Gap between the icon, title, and description in compact mode.

properties.name: --lr-empty-compact-padding
properties.description: **`<lr-empty>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-xs)`) ŌĆö Padding used in compact mode; accepts any padding shorthand (e.g. `8px 2px`).

properties.name: --lr-entity-card-compact-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-entity-card>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-xs)`) ŌĆö Gap between `[part="base"]`'s rows while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-entity-card-compact-padding
properties.description: **`<lr-entity-card>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-s)`) ŌĆö `[part="base"]` padding while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-entity-chip-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-entity-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background color.

properties.name: --lr-entity-chip-border
properties.description: **`<lr-entity-chip>`** (default: `transparent`) ŌĆö Border color of the chip.

properties.name: --lr-entity-chip-color
properties.description: **`<lr-entity-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Text/accent color. Reflected `type` lets a host theme per type from CSS, e.g. `lr-entity-chip[type='person'] { --lr-entity-chip-color: ... }`.

properties.name: --lr-env-list-reveal-active-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-env-list>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of a pressed (revealed) reveal toggle.

properties.name: --lr-env-list-reveal-active-border
properties.description: **`<lr-env-list>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Border color of a pressed (revealed) reveal toggle. Restyling the pressed state otherwise requires overriding the library-wide brand tokens, since `::part(reveal-button)[aria-pressed]` is invalid CSS.

properties.name: --lr-file-icon-size
properties.description: **`<lr-file-icon>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2rem)`) ŌĆö Inline/block size of the format badge.

properties.name: --lr-file-input-accept-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-file-input>`** (default: `color-mix(in srgb, var(--lr-color-success) 8%, transparent)`) ŌĆö Background of `[part="base"][data-drag-state="accept"]`.

properties.name: --lr-file-input-accept-border-color
properties.description: **`<lr-file-input>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-success)`) ŌĆö Border color of `[part="base"][data-drag-state="accept"]`.

properties.name: --lr-file-input-compact-font-size
properties.description: **`<lr-file-input>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-sm)`) ŌĆö Label font size while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-file-input-compact-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-file-input>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-2xs)`) ŌĆö Gap between the dropzone's slotted children while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-file-input-compact-padding
properties.description: **`<lr-file-input>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-s)`) ŌĆö `[part="base"]` padding while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-file-input-reject-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-file-input>`** (default: `color-mix(in srgb, var(--lr-color-danger) 8%, transparent)`) ŌĆö Background of `[part="base"][data-drag-state="reject"]`.

properties.name: --lr-file-input-reject-border-color
properties.description: **`<lr-file-input>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-danger)`) ŌĆö Border color of `[part="base"][data-drag-state="reject"]`.

properties.name: --lr-flag-aspect-ratio
properties.description: **`<lr-flag>`** (default: `4 / 3`) ŌĆö Rectangular flag aspect ratio.

properties.name: --lr-flag-object-fit
properties.description: **`<lr-flag>`** (default: `cover`) ŌĆö How the image fits its flag frame.

properties.name: --lr-flag-radius
properties.description: **`<lr-flag>`** ŌĆö Rectangular flag corner radius.

properties.name: --lr-flow-canvas-drop-active-outline-color
properties.description: **`<lr-flow-canvas>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Outline color of the viewport while a palette item is dragged over it (`droppable`).

properties.name: --lr-flow-canvas-grid-size
properties.description: **`<lr-flow-canvas>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-0-5rem)`) ŌĆö Dotted background spacing. The canvas also writes it inline as `${grid}px` from the `grid` property, which wins over the stylesheet fallback whenever a grid is in effect.

properties.name: --lr-flow-canvas-march-duration
properties.description: **`<lr-flow-canvas>`** (default: `var(--lr-transition-ambient)`) ŌĆö Running-edge march animation duration.

properties.name: --lr-flow-canvas-node-connect-invalid-outline-color
properties.description: **`<lr-flow-canvas>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-danger)`) ŌĆö Outline color of a node that is an invalid connect-gesture drop target. Same `::part()` attribute-selector restriction as `--lr-flow-canvas-node-current-outline-color` above.

properties.name: --lr-flow-canvas-node-connect-target-outline-color
properties.description: **`<lr-flow-canvas>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Outline color of a node that is a valid connect-gesture drop target.

properties.name: --lr-flow-canvas-node-current-outline-color
properties.description: **`<lr-flow-canvas>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Outline color of the current (`aria-current`) node. Shadow Parts forbids an attribute selector after `::part()`, so the current node could otherwise only be restyled by hijacking the library-wide `--lr-color-brand` token.

properties.name: --lr-flow-canvas-node-hover-outline-color
properties.description: **`<lr-flow-canvas>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border-strong)`) ŌĆö Outline color of a node's mouse-hover preview of its own `:focus-visible` ring. Unlike the four state-scoped colors above this one is `:hover`-gated rather than attribute-gated, so a `::part(node):hover` override would lose to this rule's own higher internal specificity rather than to the `::part()[attr]` restriction those four work around. Set to `transparent` to opt out.

properties.name: --lr-flow-minimap-block-size
properties.description: **`<lr-flow-minimap>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-8rem)`) ŌĆö Map block size.

properties.name: --lr-flow-minimap-inline-size
properties.description: **`<lr-flow-minimap>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-12rem)`) ŌĆö Map inline size.

properties.name: --lr-flow-node-compact-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-flow-node>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-2xs)`) ŌĆö Gap between `[part="card"]`'s rows while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-flow-node-compact-padding
properties.description: **`<lr-flow-node>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-xs)`) ŌĆö `[part="card"]` padding while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-flow-node-min-inline-size
properties.description: **`<lr-flow-node>`** (default: `calc(var(--lr-size-10rem) + var(--lr-size-1rem))`) ŌĆö Minimum card inline size.

properties.name: --lr-flow-node-running-border
properties.description: **`<lr-flow-node>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Border color of the card while `status="running"`. Independent from `--lr-flow-node-selected-border` so a consumer can retint just one of the two states without the other following along.

properties.name: --lr-flow-node-running-glow
properties.description: **`<lr-flow-node>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Box-shadow color of the running-state ring around the card, and the pulse keyframes' peak color.

properties.name: --lr-flow-node-selected-border
properties.description: **`<lr-flow-node>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Border color of the card while `selected`. Overriding the selection color otherwise requires hijacking the library-wide `--lr-color-brand` token.

properties.name: --lr-gauge-fill
properties.description: **`<lr-gauge>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Fill stroke for radial, ring, and linear gauges.

properties.name: --lr-graph-cat-1..8
properties.description: **`<lr-graph>`** ŌĆö Ordered categorical fallback palette for a typed node with no `GraphNodeType.color`, assigned by the type's index in `nodeTypes` (wraps every 8 entries). Declared centrally in `tokens.styles.ts` so `<lr-graph>` and any future `<lr-graph-legend>`- style component resolve the identical default.

properties.name: --lr-graph-dimmed-opacity
properties.description: **`<lr-graph>`** (default: `0.35`) ŌĆö Opacity applied to a node/link when `dimmedNodeIds`/`dimmedLinkIds` includes its id (both SVG and canvas renderers). Visible by default -- a consumer controlling `dimmedNodeIds`/`dimmedLinkIds` (e.g. `lr-knowledge-graph-explorer`) sees the dimming take effect with no extra host styling.

properties.name: --lr-graph-edge-label-halo
properties.description: **`<lr-graph>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) ŌĆö Legibility halo (`stroke`) behind a drawn edge label, painted under the fill via `paint-order: stroke`.

properties.name: --lr-graph-focus-halo-color
properties.description: **`<lr-graph>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö `focus-halo` stroke color.

properties.name: --lr-graph-hull-fill
properties.description: **`<lr-graph>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Hull fill/stroke color.

properties.name: --lr-graph-hull-opacity
properties.description: **`<lr-graph>`** (default: `0.12`) ŌĆö Hull element opacity (composites fill+stroke as one group, avoiding a double-opacity seam at the fill/stroke boundary).

properties.name: --lr-graph-legend-hidden-color
properties.description: **`<lr-graph-legend>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text-quiet)`) ŌĆö Text color for a filtered-out (hidden) legend row's label/count, independent of the shared quiet-text token.

properties.name: --lr-graph-selected-color
properties.description: **`<lr-graph>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-success)`) ŌĆö Selected node/link stroke.

properties.name: --lr-heatmap-annotation-color
properties.description: **`<lr-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-danger)`) ŌĆö Border color for an annotated cell.

properties.name: --lr-heatmap-color-steps-gradient
properties.description: **`<lr-heatmap>`** (default: `linear-gradient(to right, var(--lr-heatmap-scale-lo), var(--lr-heatmap-scale-hi))`) ŌĆö Gradient painted on the continuous legend bar. Set on the host by the component itself while `colorSteps` is supplied, and removed again when it is not; the fallback is the two-endpoint scale ramp.

properties.name: --lr-heatmap-focus-ring-color
properties.description: **`<lr-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lr-focus-ring-color)`) ŌĆö Focus ring around a focused cell.

properties.name: --lr-heatmap-label-font
properties.description: **`<lr-heatmap>`** ŌĆö Font for axis/legend labels drawn on the canvas.

properties.name: --lr-heatmap-no-data-fill
properties.description: **`<lr-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-no-data)`) ŌĆö Fill for cells with no value.

properties.name: --lr-heatmap-scale-hi
properties.description: **`<lr-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö High endpoint of the sequential color ramp.

properties.name: --lr-heatmap-scale-lo
properties.description: **`<lr-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Low endpoint of the sequential color ramp.

properties.name: --lr-heatmap-selected-color
properties.description: **`<lr-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-success)`) ŌĆö Border color for the selected cell.

properties.name: --lr-heatmap-tooltip-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) ŌĆö Hover tooltip background.

properties.name: --lr-heatmap-tooltip-text
properties.description: **`<lr-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Hover tooltip text color.

properties.name: --lr-html-viewer-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-html-viewer>`** (default: `none`) ŌĆö Maximum block size of `[part="body"]` before it scrolls internally. The `maxHeight` property sets this token inline on `[part="base"]`.

properties.name: --lr-icon-button-background
properties.description: **`<lr-icon-button>`** (default: `transparent`) ŌĆö Background fill of the native button.

properties.name: --lr-icon-button-background-hover
properties.description: **`<lr-icon-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) ŌĆö Background fill on hover.

properties.name: --lr-icon-button-border
properties.description: **`<lr-icon-button>`** (default: `0`) ŌĆö Complete border shorthand of the native button.

properties.name: --lr-icon-button-color
properties.description: **`<lr-icon-button>`** (default: `inherit`) ŌĆö Icon/text color of the native button.

properties.name: --lr-icon-button-color-hover
properties.description: **`<lr-icon-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-icon-button-color, inherit)`) ŌĆö Icon/text color on hover.

properties.name: --lr-icon-button-radius
properties.description: **`<lr-icon-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-radius)`) ŌĆö Corner radius of the native button.

properties.name: --lr-icon-button-size
properties.description: **`<lr-icon-button>`** (default: `2.5rem`) ŌĆö Minimum tappable inline and block size of the native button ŌĆö a **floor**, not a fixed size: content larger than it grows the button and keeps its own aspect ratio, while a small glyph pads out to it. A library-wide token (declared on `:root` by `tokens.styles.ts`, and the shared minimum tappable size several other components size their icon controls against), so overriding it globally resizes all of them together.

properties.name: --lr-icon-size
properties.description: **`<lr-icon>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-25rem)`) ŌĆö Inline and block size of the icon box.

properties.name: --lr-image-viewer-annotate-active-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-image-viewer>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of `[part="annotate-toggle"]` while annotation mode is on. The toggle carries its own glyph in `--lr-color-text`, so keep a 4.5:1 ratio against it.

properties.name: --lr-image-viewer-annotate-active-border
properties.description: **`<lr-image-viewer>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Border color of `[part="annotate-toggle"]` while annotation mode is on.

properties.name: --lr-image-viewer-highlight-active-color
properties.description: **`<lr-image-viewer>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Outline color of the `[part="highlight"]` matching `activeHighlightId`, independent of the per-tone border colors.

properties.name: --lr-ingestion-queue-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-ingestion-queue>`** (default: `none`) ŌĆö Non-virtualized mode only: caps how tall the list grows before it scrolls internally. Has no effect once virtualized -- the internal `<lr-virtual-list>`'s own viewport keeps its independent, fixed default height (retheme it directly via `<lr-ingestion-queue>`'s own `lr-virtual-list { --lr-virtual-list-height: ... }` if needed).

properties.name: --lr-input-control-height
properties.description: **`<lr-input>`, `<lr-number-input>`, `<lr-time-input>`** ŌĆö Exact outer control height. Unset by default, which leaves `--lr-input-control-min-height` as a floor only; set it to a length to both floor and cap the control row (e.g. to pixel-match `<lr-select>`/`<lr-combobox>` in the same toolbar). Because it is never declared by the component itself, it can be set from an ancestor or an outer-tree rule as well as inline on the element.

properties.name: --lr-input-control-min-height
properties.description: **`<lr-input>`, `<lr-number-input>`, `<lr-time-input>`** ŌĆö Outer control height floor, scaled by `size`.

properties.name: --lr-input-font-size

Unlike the size knobs above it does not vary by `size` tier. Override it to retune without a `::part(input-wrapper)` rule.

properties.name: --lr-known-date-day-field-width

properties.name: --lr-known-date-field-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-known-date>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-s)`) ŌĆö Gap between the three field blocks.

properties.name: --lr-known-date-field-height
properties.description: **`<lr-known-date>`** ŌĆö Exact block size of each `field-input`. Undeclared by default, so the field grows to fit its content, floored by `--lr-known-date-field-min-height`. Set it to pin a fixed height.

properties.name: --lr-known-date-field-min-height
properties.description: **`<lr-known-date>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2-5rem)`) ŌĆö Minimum block size of each `field-input`, auto-swapped per `size` (`xs`ŌåÆ`1.5rem`, `s`ŌåÆ`1.875rem`, `l`ŌåÆ`3rem`, `xl`ŌåÆ`3.5rem`) -- matches `lr-input`'s/`lr-date-input`'s own min-height scale, so a birthdate field sitting in a form row next to those controls renders at the same height. At `xs`/`s`/`m` the floor now exceeds the field's own content height and actively pins the rendered box; at `l`/`xl` the content height already exceeds the floor, so those two tiers are unaffected.

properties.name: --lr-known-date-field-padding-block

properties.name: --lr-known-date-month-field-width

properties.name: --lr-known-date-year-field-width

Unset by default, which leaves `--lr-phone-input-control-min-height` as a floor only; set it to a length to both floor and cap the row (e.g. to pixel-match a sibling field in the same toolbar row). Because it is never declared by the component itself, it can be set from an ancestor or an outer-tree rule as well as inline on the element.

properties.name: --lr-phone-input-font-size

properties.name: --lr-policy-summary-count-allow-color

properties.name: --lr-policy-summary-count-deny-color

properties.name: --lr-poll-status-due-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-poll-status>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-success)`) ŌĆö Background of `indicator` while `data-due` is set, without repainting every other component that reuses the shared success token.
