properties.name: --lr-push-to-talk-size
properties.description: **`<lr-push-to-talk>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-3rem)`) ŌĆö Inline and block size of the circular `trigger` button.

properties.name: --lr-qr-code-background
properties.description: **`<lr-qr-code>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) ŌĆö Light/background module color, including the quiet zone.

properties.name: --lr-qr-code-fill
properties.description: **`<lr-qr-code>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Dark/foreground module color.

properties.name: --lr-radio-label-indent
properties.description: **`<lr-radio>`** (default: `calc(min(var(--lr-icon-button-size), 1.75rem) + var(--lr-space-s))`) ŌĆö The inline distance from the control's start edge to the start of the label text, i.e. the circle's own floor plus the gap next to it. Published so a consumer composing per-option hint text under the label can align it without re-deriving that formula from the shadow styles, and used as the source of the real gap so the two cannot drift. Setting it on the element (or on `lr-radio` in your own stylesheet) moves the label; because custom properties inherit down and not sideways, it is *not* readable from a sibling node in your tree ŌĆö align a sibling by computing the same formula from `--lr-theme-icon-button-size` and `--lr-theme-space-s`, which you control.

properties.name: --lr-random-content-animation-duration

properties.name: --lr-random-content-animation-easing

properties.name: --lr-random-content-animation-translate
properties.description: **`<lr-random-content>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-0-5em)`) ŌĆö Translation distance for directional animations.

properties.name: --lr-rating-empty-color

properties.name: --lr-rating-fill

properties.name: --lr-responsive-panel-sheet-max-block-size

properties.name: --lr-retrieval-trace-active-border

properties.name: --lr-scroller-control-size

properties.name: --lr-segmented-hover-color
properties.description: **`<lr-segmented>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Text color of a hovered segment that is neither checked nor disabled. Independent of the selected-state props above ŌĆö recoloring the checked pill leaves this untouched.

properties.name: --lr-segmented-segment-padding
properties.description: **`<lr-segmented>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-0-125rem) var(--lr-space-s)`) ŌĆö Each segment's padding. Re-set per `size`; this default applies at the unset/`m` size.

properties.name: --lr-segmented-selected-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-segmented>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) ŌĆö Background of the checked segment. Scoped to `[aria-checked='true']` only, so it never repaints a hovered unselected segment (which is what hijacking `--lr-color-surface` library-wide used to do).

properties.name: --lr-segmented-selected-color
properties.description: **`<lr-segmented>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Text color of the checked segment.

properties.name: --lr-segmented-selected-font-weight
properties.description: **`<lr-segmented>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-weight-semibold)`) ŌĆö Font weight of the checked segment.

properties.name: --lr-segmented-selected-shadow
properties.description: **`<lr-segmented>`** (default: `var(--lr-shadow)`) ŌĆö Box shadow lifting the checked segment off the track.

properties.name: --lr-segmented-track-height
properties.description: **`<lr-segmented>`** ŌĆö Exact height of the `base` track, pinning it at every `size` tier (sets both `block-size` and `min-block-size`) so the row can sit flush beside a hard-sized toolbar control. **Genuinely unset by default** ŌĆö while unset each tier keeps its own `--lr-segmented-track-min-height` floor and the track grows with its content.

properties.name: --lr-segmented-track-min-height
properties.description: **`<lr-segmented>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2-5rem)`) ŌĆö Minimum height of the `base` track. Re-set per `size` (`2xs` through `xl`); the `2.5rem` (40px) default applies at the unset/`m` size, matching `<lr-input>`/`<lr-select>`/`<lr-combobox>`'s own shared default-tier floor. Because it is declared on `:host` per tier, override it on the element itself, not on an ancestor.

properties.name: --lr-select-expand-size
properties.description: **`<lr-select>`** ŌĆö Decorative expand-icon box size, scaled by `size`.

properties.name: --lr-select-font-size
properties.description: **`<lr-select>`** ŌĆö Trigger font size, scaled by `size`.

properties.name: --lr-select-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-select>`** ŌĆö Gap between the trigger's start adornment, label, end adornment, and expand icon. Doesn't vary by `size`.

properties.name: --lr-select-option-active-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-select>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of the hovered/keyboard-active option row. Not declared on `:host`, so a value set on any ancestor is never shadowed -- retheme just this row state without hijacking the shared `--lr-color-brand-quiet` token used by every other component's own hover/active state.

properties.name: --lr-select-option-selected-bg

properties.name: --lr-select-option-selected-border
properties.description: **`<lr-select>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Border color of the selected option row.

properties.name: --lr-select-option-selected-color
properties.description: **`<lr-select>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Text color of the selected option row.

properties.name: --lr-select-option-selected-font-weight
properties.description: **`<lr-select>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-weight-semibold)`) ŌĆö Font weight of the selected option row.

properties.name: --lr-select-radius
properties.description: **`<lr-select>`** ŌĆö Trigger corner radius. Doesn't vary by `size`.

properties.name: --lr-select-trigger-height
properties.description: **`<lr-select>`** ŌĆö Exact trigger height. Unset by default, which leaves `--lr-select-trigger-min-height` as a floor only; set it to a length to both floor and cap the trigger (e.g. to pixel-match a sibling field in the same toolbar row). Because it is never declared by the component itself, it can be set from an ancestor or an outer-tree rule as well as inline on the element.

properties.name: --lr-select-trigger-min-height
properties.description: **`<lr-select>`** ŌĆö Trigger block-size floor, scaled by `size`, and live at every tier including the default `m` (`2.5rem`, matching `<lr-input>`/`<lr-combobox>` at that tier).

properties.name: --lr-select-trigger-padding
properties.description: **`<lr-select>`** ŌĆö Trigger padding shorthand, scaled by `size`.

properties.name: --lr-sequence-strip-height
properties.description: **`<lr-sequence-strip>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-5rem)`) ŌĆö Block size of the strip.

properties.name: --lr-sequence-strip-legend-marker-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-sequence-strip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface-raised)`) ŌĆö Neutral chip background behind the marker legend row's bar; it stands in for "any cell", so it deliberately matches no category color.

properties.name: --lr-sequence-strip-legend-swatch-size
properties.description: **`<lr-sequence-strip>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-0-625rem)`) ŌĆö Inline and block size of a legend swatch (category and marker rows alike).

properties.name: --lr-sequence-strip-marker-color
properties.description: **`<lr-sequence-strip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Color of the bottom marker on a `marker: true` cell, and of the marker legend row's bar.

properties.name: --lr-skeleton-h
properties.description: **`<lr-skeleton>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1em)`) ŌĆö Block size of the placeholder.

properties.name: --lr-skeleton-w
properties.description: **`<lr-skeleton>`** (default: `100%`) ŌĆö Inline size of the placeholder.

properties.name: --lr-source-card-compact-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-source-card>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-2xs)`) ŌĆö Gap between `[part="base"]`'s rows while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-source-card-compact-padding
properties.description: **`<lr-source-card>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-xs)`) ŌĆö `[part="base"]` padding while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-source-picker-checked-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-source-picker>`** ŌĆö Background of a fully-checked selection control: the `select-all` pill (defaults to `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) and a fully-selected entry's `[part="checkbox"]` (defaults to `var(--lr-color-brand)`). The two keep their distinct resting defaults; setting this prop unifies both.

properties.name: --lr-source-picker-checked-border
properties.description: **`<lr-source-picker>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Border color of every checked or mixed selection control.

properties.name: --lr-source-picker-mixed-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-source-picker>`** (default: `color-mix(in srgb, var(--lr-color-brand) 50%, var(--lr-color-surface))`) ŌĆö Background of a partially-selected entry's `[part="checkbox"]`.

properties.name: --lr-span-waterfall-name-width
properties.description: **`<lr-span-waterfall>`** (default: `8rem`) ŌĆö Width of the name gutter column.

properties.name: --lr-span-waterfall-row-active-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-span-waterfall>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of the active (`activeSpanId`) row. Shadow Parts forbids an attribute selector after `::part()`, so the active row could otherwise only be restyled by hijacking the library-wide `--lr-color-brand-quiet` token.

properties.name: --lr-span-waterfall-stripe-speed
properties.description: **`<lr-span-waterfall>`** ŌĆö Animation duration for a `running` span's striped bar; defaults to `--lr-transition-ambient`.

properties.name: --lr-sparkline-area-opacity
properties.description: **`<lr-sparkline>`** (default: `0.15`) ŌĆö Fill opacity of the area under the line (type="area").

properties.name: --lr-sparkline-stroke-width
properties.description: **`<lr-sparkline>`** (default: `1.5`) ŌĆö Stroke width of the line/area path.

properties.name: --lr-spinner-duration
properties.description: **`<lr-spinner>`** (default: `800ms`) ŌĆö Duration of one rotation. Not read under `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`, where the animation is disabled entirely.

properties.name: --lr-spinner-size
properties.description: **`<lr-spinner>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-25rem)`) ŌĆö Outer diameter of the indicator.

properties.name: --lr-spinner-track-width
properties.description: **`<lr-spinner>`** (default: `var(--lr-border-width-medium)`) ŌĆö Thickness of the ring track.

properties.name: --lr-split-overlay-color
properties.description: **`<lr-split>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-overlay)`) ŌĆö The `'floating'` drawer scrim's color, applied to `[part="backdrop"]`.

properties.name: --lr-spreadsheet-viewer-highlight-color
properties.description: **`<lr-spreadsheet-viewer>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Outline color of a highlighted cell. The active highlight sets it inline to `var(--lr-color-warning, var(--lr-color-brand))`.

properties.name: --lr-stack-trace-font
properties.description: **`<lr-stack-trace>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-mono)`) ŌĆö Font family for the parsed frames and the verbatim raw fallback.

properties.name: --lr-stack-trace-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-stack-trace>`** (default: `none`) ŌĆö Cap on how tall `[part="base"]` grows before it scrolls internally. `none` lets the component grow with its content; the `max-height` attribute sets this token.

properties.name: --lr-stat-trend-bad-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-stat>`** (default: `color-mix(in srgb, var(--lr-color-danger) 8%, transparent)`) ŌĆö Background of the trend pill when its polarity is "bad".

properties.name: --lr-stat-trend-bad-color
properties.description: **`<lr-stat>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-danger)`) ŌĆö Text color of the trend pill when its polarity is "bad". Independent of the headline value's `variant="danger"` tint, which reads the shared `--lr-color-danger` token directly.

properties.name: --lr-stat-trend-good-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-stat>`** (default: `color-mix(in srgb, var(--lr-color-success) 8%, transparent)`) ŌĆö Background of the trend pill when its polarity is "good".

properties.name: --lr-stat-trend-good-color
properties.description: **`<lr-stat>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-success)`) ŌĆö Text color of the trend pill when its polarity is "good". Independent of the headline value's `variant="success"` tint, which reads the shared `--lr-color-success` token directly.

properties.name: --lr-stepper-current-color
properties.description: **`<lr-stepper>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Text color of the `current` step. Declared as an inline `var()` fallback (never on `:host`), so setting it on the element or an ancestor recolors only the current step without hijacking the library-wide `--lr-color-text` token.

properties.name: --lr-stepper-current-font-weight
properties.description: **`<lr-stepper>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-weight-semibold)`) ŌĆö Font weight of the `current` step's label. `::part(step)[data-state='current']` is invalid CSS (an attribute selector cannot follow `::part`), so this is the only way to change just the current step's boldness without hijacking the library-wide `--lr-font-weight-semibold` token.

properties.name: --lr-stepper-current-index-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-stepper>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Background of the `current` step's numbered index chip (`step-index`).

properties.name: --lr-stepper-current-index-color
properties.description: **`<lr-stepper>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) ŌĆö Text color of the `current` step's numbered index chip.

properties.name: --lr-stepper-error-color
properties.description: **`<lr-stepper>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-danger)`) ŌĆö Text color of an `error` step.

properties.name: --lr-stream-status-dot-color
properties.description: **`<lr-stream-status>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text-quiet)`) ŌĆö `indicator` dot color. Swapped by the reflected `phase`: `var(--lr-color-brand)` for `connecting`/`streaming`, `var(--lr-color-warning)` for `stalled`.

properties.name: --lr-stream-status-dot-opacity
properties.description: **`<lr-stream-status>`** (default: `0.35`) ŌĆö `indicator` dot opacity. Swapped by the reflected `phase`: `0.6` for `connecting`, `1` for `streaming` and `stalled`.

properties.name: --lr-streaming-text-cursor-height
properties.description: **`<lr-streaming-text>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1em)`) ŌĆö Height of the `cursor` bar.

properties.name: --lr-streaming-text-cursor-width
properties.description: **`<lr-streaming-text>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-0-125rem)`) ŌĆö Width of the `cursor` bar (also its border radius).

properties.name: --lr-suggestion-chips-hover-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-suggestion-chips>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of a hovered chip.

properties.name: --lr-suggestion-chips-hover-border
properties.description: **`<lr-suggestion-chips>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Border color of a hovered chip.

properties.name: --lr-svg-viewer-active-border
properties.description: **`<lr-svg-viewer>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-warning, var(--lr-color-brand))`) ŌĆö Border color of the `[part="region-highlight"]` matching `activeHighlightId`. Distinct from the resting highlight border, so the active region can be recolored without touching the rest.

properties.name: --lr-svg-viewer-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-svg-viewer>`** (default: `none`) ŌĆö Maximum block size of the scrollable body before it scrolls internally. Also settable via the `max-height` property.

properties.name: --lr-swatch-picker-fill-size
properties.description: **`<lr-swatch-picker>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-5rem)`) ŌĆö Visible fill/icon diameter for the swatch, swapped per tier.

properties.name: --lr-swatch-picker-gemstone-selected-blur
properties.description: **`<lr-swatch-picker>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-0-5rem)`) ŌĆö Selected glow blur used by `mode="gemstone"` when `--lr-swatch-picker-selected-blur` is not overridden.

properties.name: --lr-swatch-picker-gemstone-shine-duration
properties.description: **`<lr-swatch-picker>`** (default: `1.8s`) ŌĆö Selected shine duration used by `mode="gemstone"` when `--lr-swatch-picker-shine-duration` is not overridden.

properties.name: --lr-swatch-picker-hit-size
properties.description: **`<lr-swatch-picker>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2-5rem)`) ŌĆö Hit-area size (both min-inline-size and min-block-size) for the swatch button, swapped per tier and floored at 24px.

properties.name: --lr-swatch-picker-selected-blur
properties.description: **`<lr-swatch-picker>`** (default: `0`) ŌĆö Blur radius of that same ring. 0 by default (a crisp ring); set a real length (e.g. 0.4rem) for a soft glow instead.

properties.name: --lr-swatch-picker-selected-color
properties.description: **`<lr-swatch-picker>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Ring color drawn around the selected swatch, themeable independently of the focus ring and every other ring color.

properties.name: --lr-swatch-picker-shine-duration
properties.description: **`<lr-swatch-picker>`** (default: `0s`) ŌĆö Duration of a rhythmic brighten-and-settle "shine" on the selected swatch. `0s` (the default) is a no-op -- today's static look for every existing consumer. Set a real duration (e.g. 1.6s) for a pulsing shine; disabled outright under `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`. Independent of `--lr-swatch-picker-selected-blur` (a separate `filter: brightness()` animation, not `box-shadow`), so the two compose freely, and works identically for a plain color circle and an icon swatch alike.

properties.name: --lr-switch-thumb-offset
properties.description: **`<lr-switch>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2px)`) ŌĆö Inset of the thumb from the track's edges.

properties.name: --lr-switch-track-block-size
properties.description: **`<lr-switch>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-25rem)`) ŌĆö Block size of the track; the thumb's diameter is derived from it minus twice `--lr-switch-thumb-offset`.

properties.name: --lr-switch-track-inline-size
properties.description: **`<lr-switch>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2-25rem)`) ŌĆö Inline size of the track, and (with the block size) the distance the thumb travels when checked.

properties.name: --lr-table-header-sorted-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-table>`** (default: `transparent`) ŌĆö Background of the currently-sorted column's header cell (`[aria-sort]` other than `none`). Same rationale as `--lr-table-row-selected-bg`: `::part(header-cell)[aria-sort]` is invalid CSS, so this token is the supported way to recolor the sorted header without hijacking a library-wide token.

properties.name: --lr-table-header-sorted-color
properties.description: **`<lr-table>`** (default: `inherit`) ŌĆö Text color of the currently-sorted column's header cell.

properties.name: --lr-table-heat-t
properties.description: **`<lr-table>`** ŌĆö This cell's position on the heat-tint ramp, as a percentage string. Set inline by the component on each `[data-heat]` cell; not consumer-settable.

properties.name: --lr-table-heat-tint-hi
properties.description: **`<lr-table>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö High endpoint of the heat-tint ramp used by `heatValue` columns.

properties.name: --lr-table-heat-tint-lo
properties.description: **`<lr-table>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Low endpoint of the heat-tint ramp used by `heatValue` columns.

properties.name: --lr-table-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-table>`** (default: `none`) ŌĆö Cap on the scroll container's block size, past which the table body scrolls.

properties.name: --lr-table-resize-handle-opacity
properties.description: **`<lr-table>`** (default: `0.12`) ŌĆö Hover/focus opacity of the resize handle.

properties.name: --lr-table-resize-min-width
properties.description: **`<lr-table>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-3rem)`) ŌĆö Default minimum width for a resizable column without an explicit pixel `minWidth`.

properties.name: --lr-table-row-selected-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-table>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of a row whose `aria-selected` is `true`. Shadow Parts forbids an attribute selector after `::part()`, so `::part(row)[aria-selected]` is invalid CSS and the selected row could otherwise only be restyled by hijacking the library-wide `--lr-color-brand-quiet` token.

properties.name: --lr-table-row-stripe-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-table>`** (default: `transparent`) ŌĆö Background of alternating body rows. The token is read only on rows carrying the internal stripe marker, so it can be set on the table or an ancestor without affecting group, expanded, hover, or selected rows.

properties.name: --lr-table-sticky-offset
properties.description: **`<lr-table>`** (default: `0`) ŌĆö Distance a `sticky` column pins from the inline edge. Measured and set inline per column by the component so multiple sticky columns stack instead of overlapping; falls back to `0` for the first one, or before the first measurement pass.

properties.name: --lr-tabs-hover-color
properties.description: **`<lr-tabs>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Text color of a hovered, non-disabled tab. Independent of the selected-state props above.

properties.name: --lr-tabs-indicator-color
properties.description: **`<lr-tabs>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Color of the selected tab's underline, themeable independently of its text color.

properties.name: --lr-tabs-selected-color
properties.description: **`<lr-tabs>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Text color of the selected tab. Scoped to `[aria-selected='true']` only, so it never repaints a hovered unselected tab (which is what hijacking `--lr-color-brand` library-wide used to do).

properties.name: --lr-task-list-compact-body-padding
properties.description: **`<lr-task-list>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-2xs) var(--lr-space-s) var(--lr-space-s)`) ŌĆö `[part="body"]` padding while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-task-list-compact-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-task-list>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-2xs)`) ŌĆö Gap between `[part="body"]`'s item rows while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-task-list-compact-header-padding
properties.description: **`<lr-task-list>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-2xs) var(--lr-space-s)`) ŌĆö `[part="header"]` padding while `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-task-list-spin
properties.description: **`<lr-task-list>`** (default: `1s linear`) ŌĆö Running-status icon spin animation duration/timing.

properties.name: --lr-terminal-height
properties.description: **`<lr-terminal>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-20rem)`) ŌĆö Block size of `[part="viewport"]`, the scrollable log region. Not declared on `:host`, so it is inherited ŌĆö set it on the host or any ancestor.

properties.name: --lr-terminal-highlight-accent-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-terminal>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of an `accent`-tone highlighted line. Decoupled from the shared `--lr-color-brand-quiet` token also used by `[part="copy-button"]`/`[part="download-button"]`'s hover state, and from any `::part('line')` override (the background is applied inline, so a stylesheet rule can't beat it without `!important`).

properties.name: --lr-terminal-highlight-danger-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-terminal>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-danger-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of a `danger`-tone highlighted line.

properties.name: --lr-terminal-highlight-neutral-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-terminal>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) ŌĆö Background of a `neutral`-tone highlighted line.

properties.name: --lr-terminal-highlight-success-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-terminal>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-success-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of a `success`-tone highlighted line.

properties.name: --lr-terminal-highlight-warning-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-terminal>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-warning-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of a `warning`-tone highlighted line.

properties.name: --lr-test-results-filter-active-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-test-results>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of a pressed (active) status filter toggle.

properties.name: --lr-test-results-filter-active-border
properties.description: **`<lr-test-results>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Border color of a pressed (active) status filter toggle.

properties.name: --lr-test-results-filter-active-color
properties.description: **`<lr-test-results>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Text color of a pressed (active) status filter toggle. Restyling the pressed state otherwise requires overriding the library-wide brand tokens, since `::part(filter-toggle)[aria-pressed]` is invalid CSS.

properties.name: --lr-textarea-max-block-size
properties.description: **`<lr-textarea>`** (default: `none`) ŌĆö Maximum auto-grown block size before the textarea scrolls.

properties.name: --lr-thinking-panel-max-block-size
properties.description: **`<lr-thinking-panel>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-16rem)`) ŌĆö Cap on how tall the expanded reasoning transcript grows before `[part="body"]` scrolls internally.

properties.name: --lr-time-range-preset-active-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-time-range>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Background of the active preset button (`[data-active]`, i.e. the preset whose range matches the current value). Declared as an inline `var()` fallback (never on `:host`), so setting it on the element or an ancestor recolors only the active preset without hijacking the library-wide `--lr-color-brand` token.

properties.name: --lr-time-range-preset-active-border-color
properties.description: **`<lr-time-range>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Border color of the active preset button.

properties.name: --lr-time-range-preset-active-color
properties.description: **`<lr-time-range>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-on-brand)`) ŌĆö Text color of the active preset button.

properties.name: --lr-time-range-size-scale
properties.description: **`<lr-time-range>`** (default: `1`) ŌĆö Unitless multiplier applied proportionally to the handle, track, and preset-button dimensions based on the current `size` tier; the drag hit-area is floored at 24px (WCAG 2.5.8).

properties.name: --lr-timeline-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-timeline>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-l)`) ŌĆö Spacing between consecutive items along the timeline's main axis; also the length each item's own rail visually bridges to reach the next item's marker. Declared here but actually consumed inside each `<lr-timeline-item>`'s own stylesheet, via ordinary CSS custom-property inheritance across the slot boundary.

properties.name: --lr-timeline-item-direction
properties.description: **`<lr-timeline-item>`** (default: `row`) ŌĆö Internal orientation plumbing, not a retheming knob: `[part="base"]`'s `flex-direction`, set by an ancestor `<lr-timeline>`'s `:host` and inherited across the slot boundary (`row` vertical, `column` horizontal). The `row` fallback applies when the item is used standalone.

properties.name: --lr-timeline-item-gap-block-end
properties.description: **`<lr-timeline-item>`** (default: `0`) ŌĆö Internal orientation plumbing, not a retheming knob: `[part="content"]`'s `padding-block-end`, set by a vertical `<lr-timeline>` so the rail reaches the next item's marker. `0` when standalone or horizontal; retheme `--lr-timeline-gap` on `<lr-timeline>` instead.

properties.name: --lr-timeline-item-gap-inline-end
properties.description: **`<lr-timeline-item>`** (default: `0`) ŌĆö Internal orientation plumbing, not a retheming knob: the inline-axis counterpart of `--lr-timeline-item-gap-block-end`, non-zero only under a horizontal `<lr-timeline>`.

properties.name: --lr-timeline-item-rail-visibility
properties.description: **`<lr-timeline-item>`** (default: `visible`) ŌĆö Internal plumbing, not a retheming knob: `[part="rail"]`'s `visibility`, set to `hidden` by `<lr-timeline>`'s `::slotted(:last-child)` rule so the final item has no trailing rail.

properties.name: --lr-timeline-item-track-direction
properties.description: **`<lr-timeline-item>`** (default: `column`) ŌĆö Internal orientation plumbing, not a retheming knob: `[part="track"]`'s `flex-direction`, always the opposite axis from `--lr-timeline-item-direction` and set alongside it by `<lr-timeline>`.

properties.name: --lr-timeline-marker-color
properties.description: **`<lr-timeline-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text-quiet)`) ŌĆö Marker fill/accent color. Swapped per `variant` (see the class doc's variant table); a consumer overriding this directly on one item wins over the variant default via normal CSS cascade/specificity.

properties.name: --lr-timeline-marker-size
properties.description: **`<lr-timeline-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-25rem)`) ŌĆö Diameter of the marker circle (both inline-size and block-size, so the default dot stays circular).

properties.name: --lr-timeline-rail-color
properties.description: **`<lr-timeline-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) ŌĆö Color of the connecting rail line. A component-scoped property (not just inlining `var(--lr-color-border)` at every use site) so a consumer can retint just the rail without touching the library-wide border color elsewhere.

properties.name: --lr-timeline-rail-width
properties.description: **`<lr-timeline-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-border-width-medium)`) ŌĆö Thickness of the connecting rail line.

properties.name: --lr-toast-accent-color
properties.description:
**`<lr-toast>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) ŌĆö Accent bar / icon color of a slotted item, auto-swapped per its `variant`. Read by `<lr-toast-item>`, so set it on the item.

**`<lr-toast-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) ŌĆö Color of the accent bar and the icon, auto-swapped per `variant`.

properties.name: --lr-toast-accent-width
properties.description:
**`<lr-toast>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-4px)`) ŌĆö Width of a slotted item's accent bar. Read by `<lr-toast-item>`'s own stylesheet, so set it on the item.

**`<lr-toast-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-4px)`) ŌĆö Width of the accent bar, and the extra inline-start padding reserved for it.

properties.name: --lr-toast-font-size
properties.description:
**`<lr-toast>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-md)`) ŌĆö Font size of a slotted item, auto-swapped per its `size`. Read by `<lr-toast-item>`, so set it on the item.

**`<lr-toast-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-md)`) ŌĆö Font size of the item, auto-swapped per `size`.

properties.name: --lr-toast-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-toast>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-s)`) ŌĆö Gap between stacked items.

properties.name: --lr-toast-hide-duration
properties.description:
**`<lr-toast>`** (default: `var(--lr-transition-base, 180ms ease-out)`) ŌĆö Hide transition of a slotted item. Read by `<lr-toast-item>`, so set it on the item.

**`<lr-toast-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-transition-base, 180ms ease-out)`) ŌĆö Opacity/transform transition used while hiding.

properties.name: --lr-toast-padding
properties.description:
**`<lr-toast>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-m)`) ŌĆö Padding of a slotted item, auto-swapped per its `size`. Read by `<lr-toast-item>`, so set it on the item.

**`<lr-toast-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-m)`) ŌĆö Padding of the item, auto-swapped per `size`.

properties.name: --lr-toast-show-duration
properties.description:
**`<lr-toast>`** (default: `var(--lr-transition-base, 180ms ease-out)`) ŌĆö Show transition of a slotted item. Read by `<lr-toast-item>`, so set it on the item.

**`<lr-toast-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-transition-base, 180ms ease-out)`) ŌĆö Opacity/transform transition used while showing.

properties.name: --lr-toast-width
properties.description: **`<lr-toast>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-28rem)`) ŌĆö Inline size of the stack, capped by the viewport minus the placement insets.

properties.name: --lr-token-input-control-height
properties.description: **`<lr-token-input>`** ŌĆö Exact input-wrapper height. Unset by default, which leaves `--lr-token-input-control-min-height` as a floor only; set it to a length to both floor and cap the row (e.g. to pixel-match a sibling field in the same toolbar row). Because it is never declared by the component itself, it can be set from an ancestor or an outer-tree rule as well as inline on the element.

properties.name: --lr-token-input-control-min-height
properties.description: **`<lr-token-input>`** ŌĆö Input-wrapper block-size floor, scaled by `size`.

properties.name: --lr-token-input-editor-inline-size
properties.description: **`<lr-token-input>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-6rem)`) ŌĆö Inline size of the inline token editor opened by `editable`.

properties.name: --lr-token-input-font-size
properties.description: **`<lr-token-input>`** ŌĆö Input-wrapper/token font size, scaled by `size`.

properties.name: --lr-token-input-input-inline-size
properties.description: **`<lr-token-input>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-8rem)`) ŌĆö `flex-basis` of the native text input within the token row.

properties.name: --lr-token-input-min-input-inline-size
properties.description: **`<lr-token-input>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-4rem)`) ŌĆö Inline-size floor of the native text input, so it stays usable once tokens wrap.

properties.name: --lr-token-input-padding
properties.description: **`<lr-token-input>`** ŌĆö Input-wrapper padding, scaled by `size`.

properties.name: --lr-tool-approval-dialog-mono-font
properties.description: **`<lr-tool-approval-dialog>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-mono)`) ŌĆö Font family for the tool name and the raw-JSON args editor.

properties.name: --lr-tool-approval-dialog-overlay-color
properties.description: **`<lr-tool-approval-dialog>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-overlay)`) ŌĆö Backdrop scrim color.

properties.name: --lr-tool-call-chip-accent
properties.description: **`<lr-tool-call-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text-quiet)`) ŌĆö Per-status accent color for the status glyph and status text. Reassigned by this component's own `:host([status="ŌĆ”"])` rules (`running` ŌåÆ brand, `success` ŌåÆ success, `error` ŌåÆ danger, `denied` ŌåÆ warning), so a page-level override only wins for the default/`pending` tone.

properties.name: --lr-tool-call-chip-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-tool-call-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) ŌĆö Per-status chip background. Reassigned by the same `:host([status="ŌĆ”"])` rules (each status's `-quiet` tint).

properties.name: --lr-tool-call-chip-border
properties.description: **`<lr-tool-call-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) ŌĆö Per-status chip border color. Reassigned by the same `:host([status="ŌĆ”"])` rules (`transparent` for every non-`pending` status).

properties.name: --lr-tool-call-chip-spin
properties.description: **`<lr-tool-call-chip>`** (default: `1s linear`) ŌĆö Running-icon animation duration and timing.

properties.name: --lr-tool-result-dialog-maximized-inset
properties.description: **`<lr-tool-result-dialog>`** ŌĆö Insets for the maximized panel.

properties.name: --lr-tool-result-dialog-overlay-color
properties.description: **`<lr-tool-result-dialog>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-overlay)`) ŌĆö Backdrop color.

properties.name: --lr-tool-result-dialog-spin
properties.description: **`<lr-tool-result-dialog>`** (default: `1s linear`) ŌĆö Running-status animation duration and timing.

properties.name: --lr-tool-result-view-font
properties.description: **`<lr-tool-result-view>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-mono)`) ŌĆö Font family for the `fallback="text"` preformatted output.

properties.name: --lr-tool-select-dialog-overlay-color
properties.description: **`<lr-tool-select-dialog>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-overlay)`) ŌĆö Backdrop scrim color.

properties.name: --lr-tool-timeline-denied-marker-color
properties.description: **`<lr-tool-timeline>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-warning)`) ŌĆö Rail-dot color for a `status="denied"` entry, decoupled from the pending-approval border below so a consumer can retint either independently.

properties.name: --lr-tool-timeline-gap
properties.description: **`<lr-tool-timeline>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-l)`) ŌĆö Vertical gap between entries.

properties.name: --lr-tool-timeline-marker-size
properties.description: **`<lr-tool-timeline>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-0-625rem)`) ŌĆö Diameter of an entry's rail dot; also the width of the marker gutter column.

properties.name: --lr-tool-timeline-pending-approval-border-color
properties.description: **`<lr-tool-timeline>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-warning)`) ŌĆö Color of the entry body's leading border while `data-pending-approval="true"`.

properties.name: --lr-tooltip-background
properties.description: **`<lr-tooltip>`** ŌĆö Tooltip background color (default `--lr-color-neutral`).

properties.name: --lr-tooltip-color
properties.description: **`<lr-tooltip>`** ŌĆö Tooltip text color (default `--lr-color-on-neutral`).

properties.name: --lr-tooltip-max-inline-size
properties.description: **`<lr-tooltip>`** ŌĆö Maximum inline size of the tooltip (default `--lr-size-20rem`).

properties.name: --lr-tour-backdrop-color
properties.description: **`<lr-tour>`** ŌĆö Backdrop scrim fill. Defaults to `--lr-color-overlay`.

properties.name: --lr-tour-popover-max-width
properties.description: **`<lr-tour>`** ŌĆö Maximum popover inline size. Defaults to `--lr-size-22rem`.

properties.name: --lr-tour-progress-dot-current-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-tour>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Background of `progress-dot` for the current step, without repainting every other component that reuses the shared brand token.

properties.name: --lr-tour-spotlight-radius
properties.description: **`<lr-tour>`** ŌĆö Corner radius shared by the cutout and the ring. Defaults to `--lr-radius`.

properties.name: --lr-tour-spotlight-ring-color
properties.description: **`<lr-tour>`** ŌĆö Spotlight ring color. Defaults to `--lr-color-brand`.

properties.name: --lr-tour-spotlight-ring-width
properties.description: **`<lr-tour>`** ŌĆö Spotlight ring thickness. Defaults to `--lr-border-width-medium`.

properties.name: --lr-trace-tree-row-active-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-trace-tree>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of the active (`activeSpanId`) row. Shadow Parts forbids an attribute selector after `::part()`, so the active row could otherwise only be restyled by hijacking the library-wide `--lr-color-brand-quiet` token. Pairs with `--lr-trace-tree-row-active-color`: set both together, since the defaults assume the active background stays on the same side of the lightness midpoint as the ambient surface ŌĆö a dark tint in light mode needs the matching text color set too, or the row's secondary text drops below the WCAG AA contrast floor.

properties.name: --lr-trace-tree-row-active-color
properties.description: **`<lr-trace-tree>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) ŌĆö Foreground reference for the active (`activeSpanId`) row. It sets the color of that row's secondary text (`detail`, `duration`, `tokens-in`, `tokens-out`, `cost`, and the `pending` status label), which is raised from the quiet token to full-strength text so it clears WCAG AA against the active row's tint. The semantic status labels keep their own hue but are mixed 25% toward this same value, so overriding it re-aims every foreground on the row at once rather than leaving the status colors stranded. See the pairing caveat on `--lr-trace-tree-row-active-bg`.

properties.name: --lr-transition-ambient
properties.description:
**`<lr-chat-message>`** (default: `1.8s ease-in-out`) ŌĆö Streaming-indicator animation duration and timing function.

**`<lr-skeleton>`** (default: `1.8s ease-in-out`) ŌĆö Animation duration and timing function shared by the pulse and sheen effects.

**`<lr-tool-call-chip>`** (default: `1.8s ease-in-out`) ŌĆö Pending-icon pulse duration and timing.

properties.name: --lr-tree-depth
properties.description: **`<lr-tree-node>`** (default: `0`) ŌĆö Internal indent plumbing, not a retheming knob: this node's `depth`, written inline onto `[part="row"]` by the component and multiplied by `--lr-space-l` (capped at `--lr-size-8rem`) to produce the row's `padding-inline-start`.

properties.name: --lr-typing-dot-stagger-1
properties.description: **`<lr-typing-indicator>`** (default: `600ms`) ŌĆö Delay for the second dot in the dots variant.

properties.name: --lr-typing-dot-stagger-2
properties.description: **`<lr-typing-indicator>`** (default: `1200ms`) ŌĆö Delay for the third dot in the dots variant.

properties.name: --lr-typing-duration
properties.description: **`<lr-typing-indicator>`** (default: `var(--lr-transition-ambient)`) ŌĆö Animation duration and timing function for the dot-bounce/pulse/cursor-blink loop, shared by all variants. Aliases the shared `--lr-transition-ambient` token (default `1.8s ease-in-out`) by default, so retiming just this component doesn't affect other ambient-looping components in the library.

properties.name: --lr-virtual-list-height
properties.description: **`<lr-virtual-list>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-24rem)`) ŌĆö The scroll viewport's height. A virtualized list needs a bounded scroll extent, so this ships a default rather than collapsing to zero when a caller does not size the host.

properties.name: --lr-virtual-list-hover-outline-color
properties.description: **`<lr-virtual-list>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border-strong)`) ŌĆö Outline color of the mouse-hover preview on `[part="base"]` (a subtler, always-focusable-target preview of its own `:focus-visible` ring). Set to `transparent` to opt out of the hover treatment entirely.

properties.name: --lr-widget-backdrop-inset
properties.description: **`<lr-widget>`** (default: `var(--lr-widget-fullscreen-inset)`) ŌĆö The `inset` applied to `[part="backdrop"]`, so the scrim can be pulled back independently of the panel. Also set inline from the `backdrop-inset` attribute (falling back to `fullscreen-inset`). `fullscreen-inset` overrides the default `var(--lr-space-l)` inset applied to `[part="base"]` and `[part="backdrop"]` while fullscreen (e.g. `"0 0 0 240px"` to leave a persistent sidebar visible). `compact` tightens header/body padding ŌĆö same convention as `lr-empty`'s `compact`.

properties.name: --lr-widget-fullscreen-inset
properties.description: **`<lr-widget>`** (default: `max(var(--lr-space-l), var(--lr-safe-area-top)) max(var(--lr-space-l), var(--lr-safe-area-inline-end)) max(var(--lr-space-l), var(--lr-safe-area-bottom)) max(var(--lr-space-l), var(--lr-safe-area-inline-start))`) ŌĆö The `inset` applied to `[part="base"]` while `fullscreen`. Also set inline from the `fullscreen-inset` attribute.

properties.name: --lr-widget-overlay-color
properties.description: **`<lr-widget>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-overlay)`) ŌĆö The fullscreen scrim's color, applied to `[part="backdrop"]`.

properties.name: --lr-widget-view-toggle-active-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-widget>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of the pressed (`aria-pressed="true"`) view toggle. Declared as an inline `var()` fallback (never on `:host`), so setting it on the element or an ancestor recolors only the active toggle without hijacking the library-wide `--lr-color-brand-quiet` token.

properties.name: --lr-widget-view-toggle-active-color
properties.description: **`<lr-widget>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö Text color of the pressed view toggle.

properties.name: --lr-word-cloud-color-1
properties.description: **`<lr-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) ŌĆö First entry of the default categorical palette.

properties.name: --lr-word-cloud-color-2
properties.description: **`<lr-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-success)`) ŌĆö Second entry of the default categorical palette.

properties.name: --lr-word-cloud-color-3
properties.description: **`<lr-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-warning)`) ŌĆö Third entry of the default categorical palette.

properties.name: --lr-word-cloud-color-4
properties.description: **`<lr-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-danger)`) ŌĆö Fourth entry of the default categorical palette.

properties.name: --lr-word-cloud-color-5
properties.description: **`<lr-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-chart-1)`) ŌĆö Fifth entry of the default categorical palette.

properties.name: --lr-word-cloud-color-6
properties.description: **`<lr-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-chart-2)`) ŌĆö Sixth entry of the default categorical palette.

properties.name: --lr-word-cloud-color-7
properties.description: **`<lr-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-chart-3)`) ŌĆö Seventh entry of the default categorical palette.

properties.name: --lr-word-cloud-color-8
properties.description: **`<lr-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-chart-4)`) ŌĆö Eighth entry of the default categorical palette.

properties.name: --lr-xml-viewer-active-match-color
properties.description: **`<lr-xml-viewer>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-warning)`) ŌĆö Outline color of the `[part="node"]` holding the current search match. Scoped to the active match, so the dashed outline on the other matches keeps the shared warning token.

properties.name: --lr-xml-viewer-match-bg
properties.description: **`<lr-xml-viewer>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-warning-quiet)`) ŌĆö Background of a matching `[part="tag"]`/`[part="attribute-value"]`.

properties.name: --lr-xml-viewer-match-color
properties.description: **`<lr-xml-viewer>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-warning)`) ŌĆö Outline color of a (non-active) `[part="node"]` search match, and the tint source for a matching `[part="text"]`'s background. Distinct from `--lr-xml-viewer-active-match-color`, so the non-active matches can be recolored without touching the active one.

properties.name: --lr-xml-viewer-max-height
properties.description: **`<lr-xml-viewer>`** (default: `none`) ŌĆö Maximum block size of the scrollable body before it scrolls internally. Also settable via the `max-height` property.

properties.name: --lr-zoomable-frame-min-block-size
properties.description: **`<lr-zoomable-frame>`** ŌĆö Minimum viewport block size.

properties.name: --lr-zoomable-frame-zoom
properties.description: **`<lr-zoomable-frame>`** (default: `1`) ŌĆö The scale factor applied to `[part="content"]`. Written by the component itself on every render from the current `zoom`, so it is a read-out rather than a consumer knob; set the `zoom` property instead.
